Muere trabajador en planta de SpaceX en Texas, autoridades de Estados Unidos investigan fallas de seguridad en Starbase, la base espacial de Elon Musk
content: Un trabajador murió tras un accidente laboral ocurrido en una planta de SpaceX en el sur de Texas , de acuerdo con información difundida por medios locales y reportes citados por la agencia EFE. El caso ya es investigado por autoridades federales de seguridad laboral en Estados Unidos. La Administración de Seguridad y Salud Ocupacional de EEUU , conocida como OSHA , confirmó que abrió una investigación sobre lo sucedido en Starbase , el complejo espacial donde la empresa fabrica y prueba los cohetes Starship . El incidente ocurrió durante la madrugada del viernes, según información publicada por el diario San Antonio Express-News . Te puede interesar: SpaceX pierde contacto con satélite Starlink en órbita y detectan decenas de fragmentos que elevan el riesgo de basura espacial y presionan a la industria a reforzar la seguridad en misiones El accidente ocurrió dentro del complejo espacial Starbase De acuerdo con el reporte citado por medios estadounidenses, el accidente laboral ocurrió alrededor de las 4:00 de la mañana del viernes pasado. Inicialmente, el Departamento de Bomberos de Brownsville respondió a una llamada de emergencia relacionada con el incidente. Sin embargo, posteriormente se informó que: El personal médico de SpaceX atendería la situación Los equipos externos ya no ingresarían al sitio La emergencia ocurrió dentro de instalaciones privadas de Starbase Hasta el momento: Las autoridades no han revelado la identidad de la víctima No se conocen detalles específicos sobre cómo ocurrió el accidente SpaceX no ha emitido una postura pública oficial Starbase se convirtió oficialmente en ciudad en 2025 Elon Musk busca convertir base espacial "Starbase" en una nueva ciudad de Texas. Foto: Especial (AP) El accidente ocurrió en Starbase , el complejo industrial y espacial impulsado por Elon Musk en el sur de Texas. La instalación funciona como centro principal para: Manufactura de cohetes Starship Pruebas de motores y sistemas espaciales Lanzamientos de prueba de SpaceX La zona tomó relevancia internacional debido al desarrollo del programa espacial de Musk y oficialmente obtuvo categoría de ciudad durante 2025. OSHA ya había multado a SpaceX por problemas de seguridad laboral La muerte del trabajador ocurre menos de cuatro meses después de que OSHA sancionara a SpaceX por fallas relacionadas con seguridad industrial. Según reportes previos: Una grúa hidráulica colapsó dentro de Starbase La empresa no habría...

title: Shakira Wins $64 Million Refund in Spanish Tax Case: ‘There Was Never Any Fraud’
content: Shakira will receive a €60 million (about $64 million) refund after a Spanish court ruled in her favor in a long-running dispute over her taxes. On Monday, May 18, Spain’s National High Court ruled that the Spanish Tax Agency failed to prove that Shakira spent 183 days in the country in 2011, the minimum required to pay personal income tax. The €60 million sum comprises a refund on taxes and fines, plus interest. In a statement shared with Rolling Stone , the Colombian pop star celebrated the ruling: “After more than eight years of enduring brutal public targeting, orchestrated campaigns to destroy my reputation, and sleepless nights that ultimately impacted my health and my family’s well-being, the National High Court has finally set the record straight. There was never any fraud, and the Administration itself could never prove otherwise, simply because it wasn’t true.” During the case, Spanish authorities tried to tie Shakira to Spain via her then-new relationship with soccer star Gerard Piqué (the couple began dating in 2010 and split in 2022 ), but the court ruled that their relationship was not the same as a marriage (per The Associated Press ). The judge further stated that the tax authority failed to prove that Spain was “the main center or base” of Shakira’s business activities at the time. Ultimately, the court stated that the agency could prove only that Shakira spent 163 days in Spain in 2011. To further bolster her case, Shakira pointed out that she spent much of that year on the road, playing 120 concerts across 2011. Shakira’s victory, however, won’t necessarily end the dispute. Spain’s tax authority indicated its intention to appeal the ruling to the Supreme Court, and stated that no payment would be made until there is a final ruling. Still, the musician was emphatic about what today’s decision meant and pushed back against the way she was treated during the lengthy legal proceedings. “Every step of the process was leaked, distorted, and amplified, using my name and public image to send a threatening message to the rest of the taxpayers,” Shakira said. “Today, that narrative crumbles, and it does so with the full force of a court ruling. My greatest wish is that this ruling sets a precedent for the Treasury and serves the thousands of ordinary citizens who are abused and crushed every day by a system that presumes their guilt and forces them to prove their innocence at the cost of economic and emotional ruin. This victory is dedicated to...

"Parcheggi fatti male, edicola danneggiata"
content: Non c’è pace per la piazzola di via Galletta a San Lazzaro: proprio lì dove ci sono l’edicola e la fermata del bus, oltre che alcuni condomini, pare che non si trovi la ‘quadra’ con la situazione parcheggi. Nel 2021, infatti, alcuni residenti avevano scritto al Carlino chiedendo che la piazzola, luogo di parcheggio selvaggio, venisse dotata di strisce idonee per il parcheggio dei residenti. Ora che le strisce ci sono, però, a parlare è l’edicolante Mario, lì da oltre vent’anni con la moglie, e ora anche con il figlio. "La situazione rasenta la follia, ma soprattutto perché sono venuti a disegnare gli stalli per i parcheggi senza neanche interpellare chi, come noi, lavora qui da anni e sa come e dove potevano andare bene i parcheggi. Una prima volta sono arrivati i tecnici e hanno fatto una lunga fila di stalli di fronte a noi, in corrispondenza dell’ingresso in piazzola dalla strada. Un delirio: l’ultimo stallo sforava di un bel pezzo e l’autobus non riusciva neanche a curvare, e di bus non ne passano pochi". A quel punto Marco, viste le continue discussioni tra i clienti che parcheggiavano e gli autisti dei mezzi Tper, ha deciso di andare in Comune. "Sono andato per ben tre volte – prosegue – per spiegare che i parcheggi occludevano il passaggio del mezzo pubblico e che dovevano rivedere gli stalli. Poco più di una settimana fa, dunque, sono tornati i tecnici, e senza neanche interpellarci, hanno tolto il parcheggio che sforava, e fin qui tutto bene, poi hanno pensato bene di disegnare altri due stalli esattamente di fronte alla nostra edicola. Il risultato? Se vi parcheggiano camioncini o auto grandi dalla strada l’edicola non si vede, come se non ci fossimo. Quando gli stalli sono pieni l’autobus anche in questo caso gira a malapena ed è un continuo discutere. Molti clienti non si fermano per evitare problemi. È questo il modo in cui l’amministrazione vuole tutelare i commercianti? E le edicole sono pure in crisi: se vogliono che chiudiamo ce lo dicano e basta". Immediata la replica del Comune per voce di Luca Melega, assessore alla Mobilità: "Gli uffici tecnici si sono confrontati a più riprese con l’edicolante per individuare la soluzione migliore possibile, capace di tenere insieme le diverse esigenze. L’individuazione di aree specifiche per il parcheggio e lo spostamento di alcuni stalli si sono resi necessari sia per evitare una sosta selvaggia e per consentire al bus di effettuare le manovra in piena sicurezza. Allo stesso tempo,...

Indeks Kospi jatuh apabila hasil bon Korea Selatan melonjak: beli semasa susut?
content: Indeks Kospi memasuki pembetulan apabila rally baru-baru ini berehat di tengah kebimbangan pemanasan berlebihan. Ia susut kepada KRW 7,250, turun 10% dari paras tertinggi sejak awal tahun KRW 8,038. Ia masih meningkat lebih 72% tahun ini dan 178% dalam 12 bulan terakhir. Jadi, adakah ini pengakhiran rally Indeks Komposit Kospi? Saham Korea Selatan susut di tengah kebimbangan pemanasan berlebihan Indeks Kospi telah menarik diri dalam beberapa hari kebelakangan ini, bergerak dari paras tertinggi sejak awal tahun KRW 8,038 awal bulan ini kepada KRW 7,250 kini. Susutan ini bertepatan dengan kebimbangan yang semakin meningkat bahawa rally telah menyebabkan pemanasan berlebihan. Contoh jelas ialah beberapa pelabur asing terus menjual saham mereka. Mereka menjual lebih $13.2 bilion dalam saham minggu lalu, menambahkan volatiliti pasaran ke paras rekod. Terdapat tanda bahawa sesetengah pelabur Korea Selatan juga mula menjual saham mereka. Selain itu, pelabur ini sudah menyaksikan kekayaan mereka meningkat dengan pesat sejak tahun lalu. Sesuatu saham panas telah susut dalam beberapa hari kebelakangan ini. Samsung Electronics merosot kepada KRW 277,500 dari paras tertinggi sejak awal tahun 299,000. Saham SK Hynix telah jatuh kepada KRW 1.79 juta dari paras tertinggi sejak awal tahun KRW 2 juta. Namun, penganalisis percaya Indeks Kospi masih belum terlalu mahal. Sebagai contoh, indeks mempunyai nisbah PE sekitar 27, beberapa mata di atas S&P 500 yang 23. Juga, indeks ini lebih murah berbanding Nasdaq 100 yang mempunyai gandaan 35. Satu pemangkin potensi untuk indeks ialah laporan pendapatan NVIDIA yang dikeluarkan pada hari Rabu minggu ini. Nombor kukuh mungkin menunjuk kepada lebih kenaikan dalam saham semikonduktor yang boleh memberi manfaat kepada Samsung dan SK Hynix. Hasil bon Korea Selatan melonjak Sementara itu, terdapat kebimbangan bahawa bon Korea Selatan telah mengalami penjualan besar-besaran dalam beberapa bulan kebelakangan ini. Data menunjukkan hasil 10 tahun melonjak kepada 4.30% dari paras terendah sejak awal tahun 3.27%. Begitu juga, data menunjukkan hasil 5 tahun melonjak kepada 4.06%. Kenaikan hasil bon berterusan di tengah perang Iran yang sedang berlangsung, yang telah menolak inflasi Korea Selatan lebih tinggi. Data terkini menunjukkan inflasi Korea Selatan meningkat kepada 2.6% pada April tahun ini kerana kos tenaga kekal tinggi. Syarikat Korea Selatan terjejas oleh kenaikan hasil kerana ia meningkatkan jumlah yang mereka bayar apabila...

title: Kospi-Index rutscht, südkoreanische Renditen steigen: Dip kaufen?
content: Der Kospi-Index ging in eine Korrektur über, da die jüngste Rallye angesichts von Überhitzungsängsten eine Verschnaufpause einlegt. Er fiel auf KRW 7,250, ein Rückgang von 10% gegenüber dem Jahreshoch von KRW 8,038. Er liegt in diesem Jahr noch immer über 72% im Plus und 178% in den letzten 12 Monaten. Ist das also das Ende der Rallye des Kospi Composite Index? Südkoreanische Aktien geben nach wegen Überhitzungsängsten Der Kospi-Index ist in den vergangenen Tagen zurückgegangen und fiel von einem Jahreshoch von KRW 8,038 Anfang dieses Monats auf aktuell KRW 7,250. Dieser Rückgang fiel mit wachsenden Sorgen zusammen, dass die Rallye zu einer Überhitzung geführt hat. Ein deutliches Zeichen dafür ist, dass einige ausländische Investoren weiterhin ihre Aktien verkauften. Sie verkauften in der vergangenen Woche Aktien im Wert von über $13.2 billion und trieben damit die Marktvolatilität auf ein Rekordhoch. Es gibt Anzeichen, dass auch einige südkoreanische Anleger begonnen haben, ihre Aktien zu verkaufen. Außerdem ist das Vermögen dieser Anleger seit dem vergangenen Jahr bereits exponentiell gewachsen. Einige der heißesten Aktien haben sich in den letzten Tagen zurückgezogen. Samsung Electronics fiel auf KRW 277,500 vom Jahreshoch von 299,000. SK Hynix-Aktien sind von einem Jahreshoch von KRW 2 million auf KRW 1.79 million gefallen. Analysten sind jedoch der Ansicht, dass der Kospi-Index noch nicht zu teuer ist. So liegt das Kurs-Gewinn-Verhältnis des Index bei etwa 27, also einige Punkte über dem des S&P 500-Index mit 23. Außerdem ist der Index günstiger als der Nasdaq-100-Index, der ein Multiple von 35 aufweist. Ein möglicher Katalysator für den Index sind die bevorstehenden NVIDIA-Gewinnzahlen , die diesen Mittwoch veröffentlicht werden. Starke Zahlen könnten auf weitere Gewinne bei Halbleiteraktien hindeuten, von denen Samsung und SK Hynix profitieren könnten. Südkoreanische Anleihenrenditen sind stark gestiegen Unterdessen besteht die Sorge, dass südkoreanische Anleihen in den letzten Monaten deutlich gefallen sind. Daten zeigen, dass die Rendite für zehnjährige Papiere auf 4.30% von einem Jahres-Tief von 3.27% gesprungen ist. Ebenso zeigen die Daten, dass die Rendite für fünfjährige Papiere auf 4.06% gestiegen ist. Die steigenden Renditen halten vor dem Hintergrund des andauernden Kriegs im Iran an, der die südkoreanische Inflation nach oben getrieben hat. Aktuelle Daten zeigen, dass die Inflation in Südkorea im...

title: “Atiku is Unelectable, He Can’t Win Election” — Amaechi Vows Not to Step Down [VIDEO]
content: Former Minister of Transportation, Chibuike Rotimi Amaechi, has dismissed the presidential prospects of former Vice President Atiku Abubakar, declaring him unfit to win a general election. Amaechi also firmly stated his resolve to remain in the presidential race, vowing that he will not step down for any candidate ahead of the party primaries. Speaking during a live television interview on Trust TV on Monday night, the former Rivers State governor analyzed the political track record of the Peoples Democratic Party candidate. Amaechi pointed out that while Atiku has a history of securing party tickets, he consistently fails to replicate that success at the national polls. He argued that winning internal party primaries means nothing if a candidate lacks the appeal to secure a victory in the main election. Amaechi specifically highlighted Atiku’s decades-long pursuit of the presidency to back his claims about the former Vice President’s political limitations. “He has been running since 1992. Every time he has won The Primaries, he losses the Election. It’s about Electability & Atiku is not electable” – Amaechi noted during the broadcast. The presidential hopeful further explained that the narrative surrounding Atiku’s undefeated streak in primary elections is irrelevant to the current political realities facing the country. Amaechi stated, “I listen when they say former Vice President Atiku said he has never failed the primaries before. I hope this will be the first time he fails the primaries. That is not the issue, the issue is that every time he has passed the primaries, he has not won the election.” Amaechi maintained that the ruling party needs a candidate who can command votes across all geopolitical zones in the general election, rather than someone who merely excels at winning delegate votes during party conventions. He emphasized that his track record as a two-term governor and minister positions him as the most qualified candidate to lead the party to victory. The post “Atiku is Unelectable, He Can’t Win Election” — Amaechi Vows Not to Step Down [VIDEO] appeared first on Politics Nigeria .

title: Kospi-index zakt terwijl Zuid-Koreaanse obligatierendementen stijgen: dip kopen?
content: De Kospi-index trok zich terug in een correctie nu de recente rally een adempauze neemt te midden van oververhittingszorgen. Hij daalde naar KRW 7,250, 10% lager dan de YTD-top van KRW 8,038. Hij staat dit jaar nog steeds ruim 72% hoger en 178% over de afgelopen 12 maanden. Is dit het einde van de rally van de Kospi Composite Index? Zuid-Koreaanse aandelen geven terrein door oververhittingszorgen De Kospi-index is de afgelopen dagen teruggevallen, van de YTD-top van KRW 8,038 eerder deze maand naar het huidige KRW 7,250. Deze terugval viel samen met groeiende zorgen dat de rally heeft geleid tot oververhitting. Een goed voorbeeld hiervan is dat sommige buitenlandse beleggers hun aandelen zijn blijven verkopen. Zij dumpden vorige week meer dan $13.2 billion aan aandelen, wat de marktvolatiliteit naar een recordhoogte aanwakkerde. Er zijn aanwijzingen dat sommige Zuid-Koreaanse beleggers ook zijn begonnen met verkopen. Daarnaast hebben deze beleggers hun vermogen sinds vorig jaar al exponentieel zien groeien. Sommige van de heetste aandelen zijn de afgelopen dagen teruggelopen. Samsung Electronics daalde naar KRW 277,500 vanaf de YTD-top van 299,000. Aandelen van SK Hynix zijn gezakt naar KRW 1.79 miljoen vanaf de YTD-top van KRW 2 miljoen. Analisten vinden echter dat de Kospi-index nog niet te duur is. Zo heeft de index een koers-winstverhouding (P/E) van ongeveer 27, enkele punten boven de 23 van de S&P 500-index. Ook is de index goedkoper dan de Nasdaq 100-index, die een multiple van 35 heeft. Een potentiële katalysator voor de index zijn de NVIDIA-kwartaalcijfers die deze week woensdag uitkomen. Sterke cijfers kunnen wijzen op meer winst in halfgeleider­aandelen, waarvan Samsung en SK Hynix kunnen profiteren. Zuid-Koreaanse obligatierendementen zijn gestegen Ondertussen is er zorg dat Zuid-Koreaanse obligaties de afgelopen maanden zijn gedumpt. Data tonen dat het tienjaarsrendement steeg naar 4.30% vanaf het YTD-laagtepunt van 3.27%. Evenzo laat data zien dat het vijfjaarsrendement is gestegen naar 4.06%. De oplopende rendementen blijven aanhouden te midden van de aanhoudende oorlog in Iran, die de Zuid-Koreaanse inflatie heeft opgedreven. Recente cijfers laten zien dat de Zuid-Koreaanse inflatie in april is opgelopen tot 2.6% nu de energiekosten hoog blijven. Zuid-Koreaanse bedrijven worden geraakt door de stijgende rendementen omdat dit de kosten verhoogt die zij betalen bij het aantrekken van leningen. Tegelijkertijd is de Zuid-Koreaanse won de...

title: Fearing a Killer Landslide, Squamish Builds a $115-Million Wall
Sbatte contro la porta dell’auto: ciclista grave
content: Un uomo di 35 anni, domiciliato a Guastalla, è rimasto seriamente ferito in uno scontro con un’auto, avvenuto nella tarda mattinata di ieri sulla circonvallazione interna di Luzzara, nel centro abitato del paese, non distante dall’ufficio postale. L’auto era ferma, in sosta al lato della strada. E quando il conducente ha aperto la portiera per scendere dall’abitacolo, un ciclista che arrivava dalla stessa direzione è finito contro la portiera, rimediando un violento trauma cranico. E’ poi caduto sull’asfalto. E’ stato lo stesso automobilista, di fronte a ciclista che appariva in stato di choc, a dare l’allarme ai soccorsi, prestando una prima assistenza in attesa dell’arrivo del personale sanitario. In pochi minuti sono arrivati sul posto gli operatori della Croce rossa di Guastalla con l’autoinfermieristica. Il ferito è stato medicato e poi caricato in ambulanza, per essere trasportato nel piazzale antistante il vicino cimitero, dove è potuto atterrare l’elisoccorso giunto da Parma, utilizzando uno spiazzo verde accanto al camposanto del paese. Dopo le prime cure il ciclista è sembrato dare evidenti segni di ripresa, cosciente ma piuttosto dolorante per il trauma rimediato nell’impatto con la portiera della vettura. Sono intervenuti in forze anche gli agenti della polizia locale , con il reparto infortunistica, per effettuare i rilievi tecnici, che in questo caso si sono limitati alla raccolta delle informazioni su quanto accaduto attraverso le testimonianze, visto che l’auto e la bici, coinvolti nell’incidente, erano state spostate dal luogo in cui si era verificato lo scontro. Sul luogo dei primi soccorsi è intervenuto anche il sindaco Elisabetta Sottili , per sincerarsi sull’accaduto e fornire eventuale supporto con gli uffici comunali. Antonio Lecci

title: អាជ្ញាធរ​ស្រុកព្រែកប្រសព្វ ចុះ​ត្រួតពិនិត្យការលក់​ដូរនំចំណី​ នៅក្នុងបរិវេណវិទ្យាល័យព្រែកប្រសព្វ​
content: លោក​ យូរ​ សោភ័ណ​ អភិបាលរងស្រុក​ ក្នុងនាមរដ្ឋបាលស្រុក​ព្រែកប្រសព្វបានដឹកនាំមន្ត្រីរដ្ឋបាលមូលដ្ឋាន និងសមត្ថកិច្ច ចុះត្រួតពិនិត្យរាល់ការលក់ដូរ នំចំណី​ ចំណីអាហារ និងអនាម័យ​បរិស្ថាន​ នៅក្នុងបរិវេណវិទ្យាល័យព្រែកប្រសព្វ​ ស្ថិតនៅក្នុងឃុំព្រែកប្រសព្វ​ ស្រុកព្រែកប្រសព្វ​ ខេត្តក្រចេះ។ លោក​ យូរ​ សោភ័ណ​ អភិបាលរងស្រុក​ព្រែកប្រសព្វបានឲ្យដឹងថា ការចុះត្រួតពិនិត្យការលក់ដូរ នំចំណី​អាហារ នៅតាមសាលារៀន​នាថ្ងៃទី១៨ ខែឧសភា ឆ្នាំ២០២៦ គឺជាការឆ្លេីយតបទៅនិងចេញសេចក្តីណែនាំជាបន្តបន្ទាប់ពាក់ព័ន្ធនឹងការលើកកម្ពស់សុខភាព អនាម័យ និងសុវត្ថិភាពចំណីអាហារ នៅតាមសាលារៀន តាមគ្រឹះស្ថានសិក្សាសាធារណៈ និងឯកជន និងសេចក្តីណែនាំស្តីពី ការពង្រឹងវិធានការអនុវត្តក្នុងការលើកកម្ពស់សុវត្ថិភាព និងសុខុមាលភាពចំណីអាហារនៅតាមគ្រឹះស្ថានសិក្សាចំណេះទូទៅសាធារណៈ​ និងឯកជន​ របស់ក្រសួងអប់រំ យុវជន និងកីឡា​។ លោក​ យូរ​ សោភ័ណ​ បានបញ្ជាក់ថា​ នាពេលកន្លងមក អាជ្ញាធរស្រុក​ព្រែកប្រសព្វ បានជំរុញណែនាំដល់មន្ត្រីពាក់ព័ន្ធ ត្រូវចុះត្រួតពិនិត្យ ការលក់ដូរនំចំណីអាហារ និងធ្វើអនាម័យ តាមគ្រឹះស្ថានសិក្សាសាធារណៈ និងឯកជន​ ដើម្បីធានាសុខុមាលភាពសិស្សានុសិស្ស​ ថា មិនត្រូវបានរងផលប៉ះពាល់បញ្ហាសុខភាព​ដោយការបរិភោគ នំចំណីមិនបានត្រួតពិនិត្យ ឬចំណីអាហារចម្អិនមិនបានល្អត្រឹមត្រូវ ចំណីអាហារមិនបានត្រួតពិនិត្យច្បាស់លាស់ និងចំណីអាហារដែលមានរសជាតិផ្អែម ឬប្រៃ ខ្លាំង ដែលដាក់លក់នៅតាមគ្រឹះស្ថានសិក្សា។ ​ ក្នុងសកម្មភាពចុះត្រួតពិនិត្យចំណីអាហារ ខាងលើនេះ ក្រុមការងារគណ:កម្មការសុខភាពសិក្សាថ្នាក់ស្រុក បានរកឃេីញ​ចំណីអាហារដែលក្រសួងហាមឃាត់ចំនួន ១៧ប្រភេទ​ ក្នុងនោះមានដូចជា៖ ១- ស្ករកៅស៊ូ, ២- ភេសជ្ជៈកំប៉ុង ស្ទីង កូកាកូឡា ឆាំពាន គ្រុឌ មីស៊ីល, ៣- នំកញ្ចប់ផុតកំណត់, ៤- ប្រហិតគ្រប់ប្រភេទ, ៥- ចាហួយ, ៦- អាហារកែច្នៃ, ៧- តៅហ៊ូកញ្ចប់, ៨- ហតដក, ៩- ទឹកសេរ៉ូ, ១០- ស្ករសូកូឡា​ , ១១- បាញ់ត្រាំង, ១២- នំសូកូឡា, ១៣- ស្លាបមាន់ផ្ទុកសារធាតុរក្សាទុកបានយូរ, ១៤- កាហ្វេ, ១៥- តែជ្រក់, ១៦- អាហារផ្អាប់ (ជ្រក់), និងទី១៧- ពងទាស៊ីឈ័ន៕ អត្ថបទ៖ ប្រុញ វិធិន The post អាជ្ញាធរ​ស្រុកព្រែកប្រសព្វ ចុះ​ត្រួតពិនិត្យការលក់​ដូរនំចំណី​ នៅក្នុងបរិវេណវិទ្យាល័យព្រែកប្រសព្វ​ appeared first on Kampuchea Thmey Daily .

title: Kospi scivola mentre i rendimenti sudcoreani salgono: comprare il calo?
content: L'indice Kospi è entrato in correzione mentre il recente rialzo prende fiato per timori di surriscaldamento. È sceso a KRW 7,250, in calo del 10% rispetto al massimo da inizio anno di KRW 8,038. Rimane comunque in rialzo di oltre il 72% quest'anno e del 178% negli ultimi 12 mesi. Quindi, è la fine del rialzo dell'indice Kospi Composite? Le azioni sudcoreane arretrano per timori di surriscaldamento L'indice Kospi ha ritracciato negli ultimi giorni, passando dal massimo da inizio anno di KRW 8,038 all'attuale KRW 7,250. Questo ritracciamento è avvenuto mentre aumentavano i timori che il rialzo avesse portato a un surriscaldamento. Un esempio è che alcuni investitori esteri hanno continuato a vendere le loro azioni. Hanno liquidato oltre $13.2 miliardi in azioni la scorsa settimana, alimentando la volatilità del mercato a livelli record. Ci sono segnali che anche alcuni investitori sudcoreani hanno cominciato a vendere le loro azioni. Inoltre, questi investitori hanno già visto il loro patrimonio crescere in modo esponenziale dall'anno scorso. Alcuni dei titoli più performanti si sono ritirati negli ultimi giorni. Samsung Electronics è scesa a KRW 277,500 dal massimo da inizio anno di 299,000. Le azioni di SK Hynix sono precipitate a KRW 1.79 million dal massimo da inizio anno di KRW 2 million. Tuttavia, gli analisti ritengono che l'indice Kospi non sia ancora troppo caro. Per esempio, l'indice ha un rapporto P/E di circa 27, qualche punto sopra il 23 dell'S&P 500. Inoltre, l'indice è più economico del Nasdaq 100, che ha un multiplo di 35. Un potenziale catalizzatore per l'indice sono gli utili di NVIDIA in uscita mercoledì di questa settimana. Dati solidi potrebbero indicare nuovi guadagni per i titoli dei semiconduttori che potrebbero avvantaggiare Samsung e SK Hynix. I rendimenti obbligazionari sudcoreani sono schizzati Nel frattempo, ci sono timori che i titoli di Stato sudcoreani siano stati venduti negli ultimi mesi. I dati mostrano che il rendimento a dieci anni è salito al 4.30% dal minimo di inizio anno del 3.27%. Analogamente, i dati indicano che il rendimento a cinque anni è salito al 4.06%. L'aumento dei rendimenti obbligazionari è proseguito in mezzo al conflitto in Iran, che ha spinto l'inflazione sudcoreana più in alto. Dati recenti mostrano che l'inflazione sudcoreana è salita al 2.6% in aprile di quest'anno mentre i costi energetici restano elevati. Le società sudcoreane sono colpite dall'aumento dei rendimenti perché ciò...

title: NBA: Wembanyama führt Spurs zum Auftaktsieg gegen Thunder
US-Basketball: NBA: Wembanyama führt Spurs zum Auftaktsieg gegen Thunder
NBA: Wembanyama führt Spurs zum Auftaktsieg gegen Thunder
Inversión rentable: favorita entre argentinos en 2026
content: Las inversiones más rentables de mayo y del año Tras conocerse los nuevos datos de inflación, los ahorristas están interesados en conocer cuáles son las inversiones más rentables en mayo y en lo que va del año. En la primera quincena del mes, el Bitcoin fue la opción más rentable, con un avance del 2,7% en pesos, superando a otras alternativas aunque su volatilidad sigue siendo un factor a considerar. En el acumulado del 2026, el plazo fijo UVA se destaca con un rendimiento del 14,3% , ajustando por el Índice de Precios al Consumidor (IPC) y superando a la inflación registrada en abril, la más baja desde noviembre pasado. Para el resto del mes, se espera que la inflación continúe en descenso, proyectándose en un 2,3% para mayo y un 2,1% para junio. Posicionamiento de las inversiones en mayo En la primera quincena de mayo, el Bitcoin lideró con un avance del 2,7%, seguido por el plazo fijo UVA con un 1,7% . En contraste, el Merval registró una baja del 4,4%, convirtiéndose en la peor inversión en ese período. El dólar se mantuvo estable, mientras que otras alternativas como el dólar blue y las acciones del Merval presentaron caídas. Las inversiones más ganadoras en el 2026 El plazo fijo UVA se posiciona como la inversión más rentable del año, con un rendimiento del 14,3% , superando a la inflación acumulada. En contraste, el Bitcoin ha experimentado una caída del 12% en el año, mientras que otras opciones como el oro y los distintos dólares también presentan movimientos negativos. En este contexto, el nivel de tasa real corta negativa y las condiciones de liquidez en pesos son aspectos clave a considerar para los ahorristas . Las tasas de interés en pesos continúan a la baja, con expectativas de que la inflación disminuya gradualmente en los próximos meses. La volatilidad del mercado y las fluctuaciones en el precio del dólar también influyen en las decisiones de inversión. Conclusiones y perspectivas En un escenario donde las inversiones conservadoras siguen siendo atractivas y el oro se presenta como un refugio frente a la volatilidad, las decisiones de inversión deben ser analizadas cuidadosamente . A pesar de la volatilidad del Bitcoin y las caídas en el mercado de acciones, se espera que la situación se estabilice en los próximos meses. En resumen, el plazo fijo UVA se destaca como la única inversión que ha superado a la inflación en lo que va del año , mientras que otras opciones muestran resultados...

title: В Зеленокумске чиновники-волонтеры очистили от мусора берега реки Кумы
Bimbo di 4 anni investito da un’auto
content: Un bambino di quattro anni è rimasto ferito in incidente stradale avvenuto a Novellara . Il piccolo è stato urtato e sbalzato a terra da un’ auto in manovra all’interno dell’area antistante il centro commerciale di galleria Cooperatori. Per cause al vaglio delle forze dell’ordine, l’auto ha urtato il bimbo, che si trovava in zona insieme ai familiari. Il colpo lo ha sbalzato sull’asfalto. Immediato l’allarme alla centrale operativa del 118, che ha fatto intervenire sul posto il personale dell’ambulanza della Croce rossa locale insieme all’automedica della vicina sede. Dopo le prime cure il bambino, che è sempre rimasto cosciente, è stato trasferito d’urgenza al Santa Maria Nuova di Reggio, in condizioni giudicate serie ma non in pericolo di vita. Ieri mattina ancora soccorsi mobilitati, stavolta con ambulanza e automedica in via D’Azeglio, all’ingresso nord del centro abitato novellarese, dove si è verificato uno scontro tra una moto e un autocarro, all’altezza di una stazione di servizio. Ad avere la peggio il centauro, un uomo di quarant’anni residente a San Martino in Rio, che poco dopo è stato raggiunto dai soccorsi sanitari per essere poi trasportato in ospedale a Guastalla. Illeso il conducente dell’autocarro. Rilievi della polizia locale. Un incidente anche l’altro pomeriggio, con un’auto fuori strada nelle campagne tra San Giovanni e Santa Maria della Fossa, per fortuna senza gravi conseguenze per la donna al volante, che procedeva a velocità ridotta. Antonio Lecci

title: সৌদিতে পৌঁছেছেন ৬৫ হাজারের বেশি হজযাত্রী
Alex Saab enfrenta nuevos cargos por lavado de dinero en corte de Miami
content: 18 de mayo de 2026 – Miami (EE.UU.) – EFE. El empresario colombiano y exministro venezolano Alex Saab compareció este lunes ante un tribunal federal de la ciudad de Miami tras completarse su reciente proceso de deportación hacia los Estados Unidos. El procesado, señalado previamente por la justicia estadounidense como presunto testaferro del depuesto mandatario Nicolás Maduro, se presentó ante la corte para responder por múltiples señalamientos penales. Esta nueva comparecencia marca un giro importante en la situación judicial del exfuncionario en territorio norteamericano. Durante la sesión judicial, la Fiscalía del Distrito Sur de Florida formalizó las acusaciones en contra del empresario de cincuenta y cuatro años de edad. Los cargos específicos imputados incluyen los delitos de lavado de dinero, conspiración para realizar transacciones de carácter financiero de procedencia ilícita, así como el ocultamiento y la falsificación del origen de millonarios fondos económicos. De acuerdo con los reportes oficiales del tribunal, el detenido asistió a la diligencia portando la indumentaria reglamentaria de reclusión en color marrón. El historial delictivo que las agencias federales le atribuyen a Alex Saab incluye el presunto enriquecimiento ilícito mediante la adjudicación fraudulenta de contratos gubernamentales en el país sudamericano. En procesos penales previos se le había vinculado directamente como una pieza financiera clave dentro del entorno político de la dirigencia chavista. La entrega del exministro fue notificada de manera oficial el pasado fin de semana por las autoridades de Caracas, argumentando la existencia de requerimientos judiciales pendientes en el extranjero. La jueza federal encargada de presidir la primera audiencia civil determinó que el ciudadano de origen colombiano permanecerá bajo custodia estatal sin la opción de solicitar libertad bajo fianza. La magistrada Marty Fulgueira Elfenbein fijó la fecha del próximo veinticuatro de junio para la reanudación formal del procedimiento legal en el estado de Florida. Hasta esa fecha, el investigado permanecerá internado en un centro de detención metropolitano luego de su arribo vía aérea por el aeropuerto de Opa-locka. Este acontecimiento representa la segunda ocasión en que el empresario debe afrontar a las instituciones judiciales de Miami por delitos financieros de índole internacional. En el año 2023, la administración del entonces presidente...

title: המשטרה נערכת לטירוף של אוהדי בית"ר ירושלים, יצחקי מזהיר
"שיזד**ן": העימות הלוהט בין כוכב ה-NBA והפרשן הפופולרי | צפו
ខេត្ត​តាកែវ ជំរុញយុទ្ធនាការ «Green Season» ប្រែក្លាយរដូវភ្ញៀវតិច ទៅជារដូវទេសចរណ៍ធម្មជាតិដ៏ទាក់ទាញ
content: រដ្ឋបាលខេត្តតាកែវ សហការជាមួយក្រសួងទេសចរណ៍ បានបើកកិច្ចប្រជុំផ្សព្វផ្សាយ និងជំរុញយុទ្ធនាការ «ទស្សនាកម្ពុជានៅរដូវកាលបៃតង (Green Season)» ដើម្បីលើកកម្ពស់សក្តានុពលទេសចរណ៍ធម្មជាតិ និងបង្វែរផ្នត់គំនិតភ្ញៀវទេសចរ ពីការយល់ឃើញថា រដូវវស្សាគឺជារដូវស្ងាត់ភ្ញៀវ មកជារដូវកាលដ៏ស្រស់បំព្រង និងមានភាពទាក់ទាញសម្រាប់ការកម្សាន្តបែបធម្មជាតិវិញ។ កិច្ចប្រជុំនេះបានប្រព្រឹត្តទៅនាព្រឹកថ្ងៃទី១៩ ខែឧសភា ឆ្នាំ២០២៦ នៅសាលប្រជុំមន្ទីរទេសចរណ៍ខេត្តតាកែវ ក្រោមអធិបតីភាពលោក ប្រាក់ ចន្ទ័តារា អនុរដ្ឋលេខាធិការក្រសួងទេសចរណ៍ និងលោក ងិន ងិនដា អភិបាលរងខេត្ត តំណាងដ៏ខ្ពង់ខ្ពស់លោក វ៉ី សំណាង អភិបាលខេត្តតាកែវ ដោយមានការចូលរួមពីថ្នាក់ដឹកនាំមន្ទីរ-អង្គភាពពាក់ព័ន្ធ មន្ត្រីជំនាញ អាជ្ញាធរមូលដ្ឋាន និងភាគីពាក់ព័ន្ធក្នុងវិស័យទេសចរណ៍ជាច្រើនរូប។ ថ្លែងក្នុងកិច្ចប្រជុំ លោក ប្រាក់ ចន្ទ័តារា បានជំរុញឱ្យមន្ទីរទេសចរណ៍ខេត្ត និងស្ថាប័នពាក់ព័ន្ធ បង្កើនការផ្សព្វផ្សាយពីសក្តានុពលទេសចរណ៍របស់ខេត្តតាកែវ ឱ្យកាន់តែទូលំទូលាយ ជាពិសេសតំបន់ទេសចរណ៍ធម្មជាតិ អេកូទេសចរណ៍ និងទីកន្លែងមានទេសភាពបៃតងស្រស់បំព្រងក្នុងរដូវវស្សា ដែលអាចទាក់ទាញភ្ញៀវទេសចរជាតិ និងអន្តរជាតិឱ្យមកទស្សនាកម្សាន្តកាន់តែច្រើន។ លោកបានលើកឡើងថា យុទ្ធនាការ «Green Season» មិនត្រឹមតែជាការផ្សព្វផ្សាយទេសចរណ៍ប៉ុណ្ណោះទេ ប៉ុន្តែជាការផ្លាស់ប្តូរទស្សនៈ និងផ្នត់គំនិតរបស់ភ្ញៀវទេសចរ ឱ្យមើលឃើញពីសម្រស់ធម្មជាតិ និងបរិយាកាសស្រស់ស្រាយនៅរដូវវស្សា ដែលជាពេលវេលាដ៏ល្អសម្រាប់ការសម្រាកលំហែកាយ ទស្សនាទេសភាពបៃតង និងស្វែងយល់ពីជីវភាពរស់នៅតាមសហគមន៍មូលដ្ឋាន។ ខេត្តនេះមានតំបន់ទេសចរណ៍ល្បីៗជាច្រើន ដូចជា រមណីយដ្ឋានភ្នំដា តំបន់បុរាណវិទ្យាអង្គរបុរី ភ្នំតាម៉ៅ និងរមណីយដ្ឋានធម្មជាតិជាច្រើនទៀត ដែលមានទេសភាពស្រស់ស្អាតជាពិសេសនៅរដូវភ្លៀងធ្លាក់ បង្កើតបានជាបរិយាកាសត្រជាក់ស្រួល និងពោរពេញដោយពណ៌បៃតងខ្ចី។ មន្ត្រីជំនាញក្នុងវិស័យទេសចរណ៍ បានលើកឡើងដែរថា ការជំរុញយុទ្ធនាការ «Green Season» គឺជាផ្នែកមួយនៃយុទ្ធសាស្ត្ររបស់រាជរដ្ឋាភិបាល ក្នុងការធ្វើឱ្យវិស័យទេសចរណ៍មានចលនាពេញមួយឆ្នាំ កាត់បន្ថយភាពខុសគ្នារវាងរដូវភ្ញៀវច្រើន និងរដូវភ្ញៀវតិច ព្រមទាំងជួយលើកស្ទួយសេដ្ឋកិច្ចមូលដ្ឋាន បង្កើតការងារ និងបង្កើនប្រាក់ចំណូលជូនប្រជាពលរដ្ឋដែលប្រកបរបរពាក់ព័ន្ធនឹងវិស័យទេសចរណ៍។ ជាមួយគ្នានេះ អាជ្ញាធរខេត្ត និងមន្ទីរទេសចរណ៍ ក៏ត្រៀមជំរុញការរៀបចំហេដ្ឋារចនាសម្ព័ន្ធ កែលម្អបរិស្ថាន អនាម័យ សណ្តាប់ធ្នាប់ និងគុណភាពសេវាកម្មទេសចរណ៍ ឱ្យកាន់តែល្អប្រសើរ ដើម្បីបង្កើនភាពជឿជាក់ និងផ្តល់បទពិសោធន៍ល្អដល់ភ្ញៀវទេសចរ ដែលមកទស្សនាកម្សាន្តក្នុងខេត្តតាកែវ៕ អត្ថបទ៖ វីរៈ The post ខេត្ត​តាកែវ ជំរុញយុទ្ធនាការ «Green Season» ប្រែក្លាយរដូវភ្ញៀវតិច ទៅជារដូវទេសចរណ៍ធម្មជាតិដ៏ទាក់ទាញ appeared first on Kampuchea Thmey Daily .

title: Bengaluru braces for more rain as cyclonic circulation strengthens over Karnataka
Kospi-indeksi laskee Etelä-Korean korkojen noustessa – osta laskusta?
content: Kospi-indeksi vetäytyi korjausliikkeeseen, kun viimeaikainen ralli pitää taukoa ylikuumenemis‐huolien keskellä. Se laski KRW 7,250:een, noin 10 % vuoden alusta saavutetusta huipusta KRW 8,038:sta. Indeksi on silti noussut yli 72 % tänä vuonna ja 178 % viimeisten 12 kuukauden aikana. Onko tämä siis Kospi-indeksin rallin loppu? Etelä-Korean osakkeet vetäytyvät ylikuumenemis­huolien vuoksi Kospi on vetäytynyt viime päivinä, laskien kuukauden alun vuoden alusta saavutetusta huipusta KRW 8,038:sta nykyiseen KRW 7,250:een. Tämä vetäytyminen ajoittuu lisääntyneiden huolten kanssa siitä, että nousu on johtanut ylikuumenemiseen. Hyvä esimerkki on se, että osa ulkomaisista sijoittajista on jatkanut osakkeiden myyntiä. He myivät viime viikolla yli $13.2 billionin arvosta osakkeita, mikä lisäsi markkinoiden volatiliteettia ennätystasolle. On merkkejä siitä, että myös jotkut eteläkorealaiset sijoittajat ovat alkaneet myydä osakkeitaan. Lisäksi nämä sijoittajat ovat nähneet varallisuutensa kasvaneen eksponentiaalisesti viime vuodesta lähtien. Jotkin kuumimmista osakkeista ovat vetäytyneet viime päivinä. Samsung Electronics laski KRW 277,500:aan vuoden alusta saavutetusta huipusta KRW 299,000:sta. SK Hynixin osakkeet ovat pudonneet KRW 1.79 miljoonaan vuoden alusta saavutetusta huipusta KRW 2 million:aan. Silti analyytikot uskovat, että Kospi-indeksi ei ole vielä liian kallis. Esimerkiksi indeksin P/E on noin 27, muutaman pisteen S&P 500 -indeksin 23:ta korkeampi. Lisäksi indeksi on halvempi kuin Nasdaq 100 -indeksi, jonka P/E on 35. Mahdollinen katalyytti indeksille on NVIDIA:n tulosjulkistus , joka julkaistaan tällä viikolla keskiviikkona. Vahvat luvut voivat indikoida lisänousuja puolijohdeosakkeissa, joista Samsung ja SK Hynix voisivat hyötyä. Etelä-Korean korkotuotot ovat nousseet Samaan aikaan huolta herättää Etelä-Korean velkakirjojen hintojen lasku viime kuukausina. Data osoittaa, että 10 vuoden tuotto nousi 4.30%:iin vuoden alusta alimmasta 3.27%:sta. Vastaavasti data näyttää, että 5 vuoden tuotto on noussut 4.06%:iin. Korkojen nousu on jatkunut käynnissä olevan Iranin sodan taustalla, mikä on nostanut Etelä-Korean inflaatiota. Viimeaikaiset tiedot osoittavat, että Etelä-Korean inflaatio nousi 2.6%:iin huhtikuussa tänä vuonna, kun energiakustannukset pysyvät koholla. Etelä-Korean yritykset kärsivät korkojen noususta, koska se kasvattaa niiden lainanoton kustannuksia. Samaan aikaan...

Sadam Bulega: A crucial marketing asset at Uganda Secondary Schools Sports Association
content: Uganda Secondary Schools Sports Association (USSSA) recently confirmed Sadam Bulega as the Chief Marketing Officer (CMO). A Bachelor of Science Degree holder in Marketing from Makerere University Business School (MUBS), Bulega is a vastly experienced sports marketer and administrator having served domestically and on the continent. Sadam Bulega He comes to the secondary sports body with a wealth of experience having served at the Federation of Uganda Football Associations (FUFA) for close to a decade and lately at the Confederation of Africa Football (CAF). Bulega’s tenure at FUFA witnessed him serve in different marketing roles as Marketing Assistant, Acting Marketing Director, and Brand Manager. He served on key football properties and events, including the Uganda Cranes, FUFA Awards, FUFA Drum, FUFA Women Super League, and other FUFA football competitions and activities. Sadam Bulega, CMO at Uganda Secondary Schools Sports Association Bulega served as the Venue Marketing Manger during the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) in Morocco and the CAF women’s championship where he supported marketing operations, sponsor integration, brand visibility, and sponsor activation execution. At USSSA, he is tasked to effect the body’s marketing, commercial strategy, sponsorship acquisition, sponsor servicing, brand management, digital marketing, stakeholder engagement, event commercialization and brand activation. My focus at Uganda Sports Secondary Schools Sports Association (USSSA) will be on driving brand growth, developing the sponsorship portfolio, strengthening digital marketing, improving partner value delivery, packaging commercial opportunities, enhancing fan engagement, and positioning school sports as a strong national youth sports platform. Sadam Bulega, Chief Marketing Officer (CMO) – Uganda Secondary School Schools Sports Association (USSSA) Sadam Bulega poses during the CAF Women’s Africa Cup of Nations in Morocco A smiling Sadam Bulega For starters, Bulega is currently pursuing a Postgraduate Diploma in Football Business at the Johan Cruyff Institute in Barcelona city, Spain. He also holds a Diploma in Business Administration from YMCA, Football Administration and Management training from FUFA, FIFA Digital Skills for Football Professionals, and Sport Administration and Sport Promotion training from JICA in Tokyo, Japan (2025). He is also equipped with Football Administration and Management training with a FAMACO III certificate. USSSA organizes...

title: Indeks Kospi spada, a rentowności koreańskich obligacji rosną — kupować spadek?
content: Indeks Kospi cofnął się do korekty, gdy niedawny rajd zrobił sobie przerwę w związku z obawami o przegrzanie rynku. Spadł do KRW 7,250, czyli o 10% względem najwyższego poziomu od początku roku KRW 8,038. Wciąż pozostaje wyżej o ponad 72% w tym roku i o 178% w ciągu ostatnich 12 miesięcy. Czy to koniec rajdu indeksu Kospi Composite? Koreańskie akcje cofają się w związku z obawami o przegrzanie rynku Indeks Kospi cofał się w ciągu ostatnich kilku dni, z poziomu maksimum od początku roku KRW 8,038 na początku miesiąca do obecnych KRW 7,250. To cofnięcie zbiegło się ze wzrostem obaw, że rajd doprowadził do przegrzania rynku. Dobrym przykładem jest fakt, że niektórzy inwestorzy zagraniczni nadal sprzedawali swoje udziały. W zeszłym tygodniu zrzucili ponad 13,2 mld USD akcji, napędzając zmienność rynku do rekordowego poziomu. Są też sygnały, że niektórzy inwestorzy koreańscy również zaczęli sprzedawać swoje akcje. Poza tym inwestorzy ci już od zeszłego roku widzieli gwałtowny wzrost swojego majątku. Niektóre z najszybciej rosnących akcji cofnęły się w ciągu ostatnich kilku dni. akcje Samsung Electronics spadły do KRW 277,500 z maksimum od początku roku wynoszącego 299,000. Akcje SK Hynix potaniały do KRW 1.79 mln z najwyższego poziomu od początku roku KRW 2 mln. Mimo to analitycy uważają, że indeks Kospi nadal nie jest wystarczająco drogi. Na przykład indeks ma wskaźnik P/E na poziomie około 27, kilka punktów powyżej 23 dla indeksu S&P 500. Ponadto indeks jest tańszy niż indeks Nasdaq 100, który ma mnożnik 35. Potencjalnym katalizatorem dla indeksu są nadchodzące wyniki NVIDIA , które zostaną opublikowane w środę tego tygodnia. Mocne dane mogą wskazać na dalsze zyski w akcjach półprzewodnikowych, co może przynieść korzyści Samsungowi i SK Hynix. Rentowności koreańskich obligacji znacząco wzrosły Tymczasem pojawiają się obawy, że koreańskie obligacje doświadczyły gwałtownego spadku w ostatnich miesiącach. Dane pokazują, że rentowność 10-letnich obligacji wzrosła do 4,30% z najniższego poziomu od początku roku 3,27%. Podobnie dane wskazują, że rentowność 5-letnich papierów wzrosła do 4,06%. Rosnące rentowności obligacji utrzymują się w związku z trwającą wojną w Iranie, co podbija inflację w Korei Południowej. Najnowsze dane pokazują, że inflacja w Korei Południowej wzrosła do 2,6% w kwietniu tego roku, ponieważ koszty energii pozostają podwyższone. Firmy...

title: Fungsi KYC dalam Menjaga Keamanan Akun Trading
content: Keamanan dalam ekosistem keuangan digital telah menjadi prioritas utama seiring dengan meningkatnya volume transaksi lintas negara. Di tengah kemudahan akses pasar global, risiko kejahatan siber dan pencucian uang juga turut membayangi para pelaku pasar. Untuk memitigasi risiko tersebut, lembaga keuangan di seluruh dunia menerapkan protokol standarisasi internasional yang ketat sebelum mengizinkan nasabah untuk bertransaksi secara penuh. Prosedur ini bukan hanya sekadar formalitas administratif, melainkan sebuah benteng perlindungan yang dirancang untuk memastikan bahwa setiap aktivitas keuangan dilakukan oleh individu yang sah dan memiliki identitas yang dapat dipertanggungjawabkan secara hukum. Memahami Fungsi KYC dalam Menjaga Keamanan Akun Trading Bagi para trader, sangat penting untuk memahami secara mendalam mengenai Fungsi KYC dalam Menjaga Keamanan Akun Trading sebagai langkah preventif terhadap penyalahgunaan data. Know Your Customer atau KYC adalah proses verifikasi identitas yang diwajibkan oleh regulator global untuk memastikan bahwa layanan keuangan tidak digunakan untuk aktivitas ilegal. Melalui pengumpulan dokumen resmi seperti kartu identitas dan bukti domisili, broker dapat memastikan bahwa orang yang mengakses dana tersebut adalah pemilik akun yang sebenarnya. Hal ini secara signifikan memperkecil peluang terjadinya pencurian identitas atau pengambilalihan akun oleh pihak yang tidak bertanggung jawab. Selain aspek keamanan individu, prosedur ini juga berperan dalam menciptakan ekosistem pasar yang transparan dan stabil. Dengan mengetahui profil risiko dan identitas setiap nasabah, penyedia layanan dapat memantau adanya aktivitas transaksi yang mencurigakan secara lebih efektif. Perlindungan ini memberikan ketenangan pikiran bagi investor, karena mereka tahu bahwa mereka beroperasi di dalam platform yang mematuhi regulasi hukum dan mengutamakan keselamatan aset nasabah. Dalam jangka panjang, penerapan standar verifikasi yang ketat akan memperkuat integritas industri perdagangan berjangka dan meningkatkan kepercayaan publik terhadap pasar finansial. Integrasi Keamanan dan Kecepatan dalam Platform Modern Meskipun proses verifikasi identitas memerlukan ketelitian, teknologi modern kini memungkinkan prosedur tersebut berjalan dengan jauh lebih cepat tanpa mengorbankan standar keamanan. Infrastruktur digital yang andal memastikan bahwa data sensitif nasabah disimpan dalam sistem terenkripsi yang sulit ditembus oleh pihak luar. Hal ini...

title: Βρετανία: Καταγγελίες για βιασμούς και επιθέσεις σε γνωστό ριάλιτι γάμων - Βίντεο
Índice Kospi recua enquanto rendimentos dos títulos sul-coreanos disparam: comprar na queda?
content: O Índice Kospi entrou em correção enquanto o rali recente faz uma pausa diante de preocupações de superaquecimento. Recuou para KRW 7,250, queda de 10% em relação à máxima desde o início do ano de KRW 8,038. Permanece com alta de mais de 72% este ano e 178% nos últimos 12 meses. Então, seria este o fim do rali do Índice Kospi Composite? Ações sul-coreanas recuam diante de preocupações de superaquecimento O Índice Kospi recuou nos últimos dias, passando da máxima do ano de KRW 8,038 no início deste mês para os atuais KRW 7,250. Esse recuo coincidiu com o aumento das preocupações de que o rali tenha levado a um superaquecimento. Um bom exemplo é o fato de que alguns investidores estrangeiros continuaram vendendo suas ações. Eles despejaram mais de $13.2 billion em ações na semana passada, levando a volatilidade do mercado a um nível recorde. Há sinais de que alguns investidores sul-coreanos também começaram a vender suas ações. Além disso, esses investidores já viram seu patrimônio crescer exponencialmente desde o ano passado. Algumas das ações mais aquecidas recuaram nos últimos dias. Samsung Electronics caiu para KRW 277,500 desde a máxima do ano de KRW 299,000. As ações da SK Hynix despencaram para KRW 1.79 million desde a máxima do ano de KRW 2 million. Ainda assim, analistas acreditam que o Índice Kospi ainda não está caro o suficiente. Por exemplo, o índice tem um múltiplo P/L de cerca de 27, alguns pontos acima dos 23 do S&P 500. Além disso, o índice é mais barato que o Nasdaq 100, que tem múltiplo de 35. Um potencial catalisador para o índice são os resultados da NVIDIA , que saem nesta quarta-feira. Números fortes podem sinalizar mais ganhos nas ações de semicondutores que podem beneficiar Samsung e SK Hynix. Rendimentos dos títulos sul-coreanos dispararam Enquanto isso, há preocupações de que os títulos sul-coreanos tenham sofrido forte pressão vendedora nos últimos meses. Os dados mostram que o rendimento de dez anos saltou para 4.30% desde a mínima do ano de 3.27%. Da mesma forma, os dados mostram que o rendimento de cinco anos subiu para 4.06%. A alta dos rendimentos dos títulos ocorre em meio à guerra no Irã, que elevou a inflação sul-coreana. Dados recentes mostram que a inflação da Coreia do Sul subiu para 2.6% em abril deste ano, com os custos de energia permanecendo elevados. As empresas sul-coreanas são afetadas pela alta dos rendimentos porque isso aumenta o custo...

title: Comunali, il rebus a destra. Castaldini: "Ora vediamoci. Un civico? Non ha senso"
content: "Ora è tempo di vedersi e guardarsi in faccia all’interno del tavolo di centrodestra che abbiamo sempre organizzato". Valentina Castaldini, consigliera regionale di Forza Italia, è sicura e lo ripete: per le Comunali 2027 serve un candidato di partito e non un profilo civico. "Mi sembra evidente che ci siano tre fronti divisi", dice l’azzurra, tracciando uno schema definito: Matteo Lepore che con il centrosinistra correrà per il bis da sindaco, una moltitudine di candidature civiche che sembrano convergere sempre più sul nome dell’imprenditore ed ex Cinque stelle Giovanni Favia, e il centrodestra appunto. "Parlare di civismo vuol dire non parlare della realtà: mi sembra chiaro che a noi spetti un’altra scelta", insiste Castaldini. Poi ammette di non aver parlato ancora della partita bolognese con i vertici nazionali di FI perché "c’è un modo di lavorare che è quello che abbiamo sempre utilizzato", ovvero iniziare proprio da un tavolo regionale del centrodestra, prima di definire gli accordi sulle varie città e arrivare a un ‘passaggio’ a Romma sulle sfide più importanti. Questo perché "lo scacchiere è nazionale", ancora di più se il voto il prossimo anno si intreccerà con le Politiche. "A noi spetta il privilegio di lavorare insieme, di non fare fughe in avanti, di non aver paura – chiude l’azzurra –. Io non ho paura di perdere e non cerco il candidato migliore per non fare brutta figura. Alla coalizione di centrodestra deve interessare fare una campagna elettorale all’altezza delle persone che si incontrano ogni giorno. A noi spetta il coraggio di una scelta che sia dentro l’alveo dei partiti, perché ad altri non interessa interloquire con il centrodestra e noi siamo chiamati a una candidatura che risponda all’esigenza dei cittadini". E se da Fratelli d’Italia è emersa la preferenza, al contrario, per un profilo civico, è il senatore Marco Lisei a fare chiarezza: "Manca ancora tempo alle elezioni – chiosa il senatore meloniano –: a un anno dal voto è naturale ci sia un confronto su soluzioni differenti, d’altronde il dibattito tra un civico o politico c’è sempre stato, anche quando vinse Guazzaloca". "La preferenza su un civico nasce dai dati elettorali delle Politiche – prosegue Lisei –, delle Regionali e delle Europee, che ci consegnano la necessità di allargare il perimetro del consenso: il centrodestra comunque troverà come sempre una sintesi e si presenterà compatto. Anche perché Lepore è debole, è stato divisivo e...

Don’t Push Me, Gov Yusuf Warns Kwankwaso
content: Governor Abba Kabir Yusuf of Kano State has tackled his estranged benefactor, Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso, over “frequent attacks” against him, saying his silence should not be misinterpreted as fear. Addressing party supporters during the official affirmation of Sulaiman Kawu Sumaila as the All Progressives Congress (APC) senatorial candidate for Kano South held in Rano yesterday, Governor Yusuf said he would soon start ‘talking’ if pushed to the wall. That is the first time the governor has been heard directly confronting the Kwankwasiyya leader in a confrontational tone since the duo parted ways earlier this year. He said, “For us, Kano peace is our priority, but if we are pushed to the wall, we will open our mouths and talk. Silence is not a sign of fear. “Even to keep quiet is an act of worship, not because we are afraid, not because we are kids. How could a 69-year-old call a 63-year-old a kid? It is just a personal respect that you are slightly older than I am. “However, if an old man does not respect himself and keeps quiet, the younger one will have something to say. So, we are pleading with them in the name of the Almighty and His Messenger to keep their mouths shut. Otherwise, you will hear a lot of revelations.” His comment comes after Kwankwaso told Trust TV in an exclusive interview that Yusuf made a big mistake leaving the Kwankwasiyya Movement. The Nigeria Democratic Coalition (NDC) chieftain also boasted about how the movement made his former personal assistant a governor.

Kospi-indeksen faller etter at sørkoreanske obligasjonsrenter stiger: kjøp dippen?
content: Kospi-indeksen trakk seg tilbake inn i en korreksjon da den nylige oppturen tar en pustepause på grunn av overopphetingsbekymringer. Den falt til KRW 7,250, ned 10 % fra årets høyeste nivå på KRW 8,038. Den er likevel opp over 72 % i år og 178 % de siste 12 månedene. Er dette slutten på oppgangen i Kospi Composite Index? Sørkoreanske aksjer faller på grunn av overopphetingsbekymringer Kospi-indeksen har trukket seg tilbake de siste dagene, fra årets høyeste nivå på KRW 8,038 tidligere denne måneden til dagens KRW 7,250. Denne tilbakegangen har sammenfalt med økende bekymring for at oppgangen har ført til overoppheting. Et godt eksempel er at noen utenlandske investorer har fortsatt å selge sine aksjer. De solgte for over $13.2 billion i aksjer forrige uke, noe som drev markedsvolatiliteten til et rekordnivå. Det finnes tegn på at enkelte sørkoreanske investorer også har begynt å selge. I tillegg har disse investorene allerede sett formuen sin vokse eksponentielt siden i fjor. Noen av de heteste aksjene har trukket seg tilbake de siste dagene. Samsung Electronics falt til KRW 277,500 fra årets høyeste på 299,000. SK Hynix-aksjene har stupt til KRW 1.79 million fra årets høyeste på KRW 2 million. Likevel mener analytikere at Kospi-indeksen fortsatt ikke er overpriset. For eksempel har indeksen et P/E-forhold på omtrent 27, noen poeng over S&P 500-indeksens 23. Dessuten er indeksen billigere enn Nasdaq 100-indeksen, som har en multipel på 35. En potensiell katalysator for indeksen er de kommende NVIDIAs resultater som kommer onsdag denne uken. Sterke tall kan peke mot mer oppgang i halvlederaksjer som kan gagne Samsung og SK Hynix. Sørkoreanske obligasjonsrenter har steget markant Samtidig er det bekymring for at sørkoreanske obligasjonskurser har falt de siste månedene. Data viser at tiårsrenten hoppet til 4.30 % fra årets laveste på 3.27 %. På samme måte viser data at femårsrenten har steget til 4.06 %. Rentenes oppgang har fortsatt midt i den pågående krigen i Iran, som har presset sørkoreansk inflasjon opp. Nylige tall viser at Sør-Koreas inflasjon steg til 2.6 % i april i år, ettersom energikostnadene forblir høye. Sørkoreanske selskaper rammes av høyere renter fordi det øker beløpet de betaler ved låneopptak. Samtidig har den sørkoreanske wona fortsatt å svekke seg de siste dagene. USD/KRW-paret steg til 1,505, det høyeste nivået siden 7. april i år. Det har steget med 4.63 % fra sitt laveste punkt forrige måned....

Waarom worden goudhandelaren deze week plotseling voorzichtiger?
content: De goudprijzen veranderden weinig op dinsdag, terwijl beleggers na de recente marktvolatiliteit een pas op de plaats maakten en hun aandacht richtten op ontwikkelingen in het Midden-Oosten en op aanstaande signalen van de Federal Reserve over de rente. Spotgoud zakte 0.1% tot $4,560.39 per ounce om 0228 GMT, terwijl Amerikaanse goudfutures voor levering in juni 0.1% hoger gingen tot $4,563.10 per ounce op de COMEX in New York. De markttoon volgde op de beslissing van de Amerikaanse president Donald Trump om een geplande militaire aanval op Iran op te schorten, waardoor de onmiddellijke vrees voor een bredere regionale escalatie die energiemarkten zou kunnen verstoren en de mondiale inflatiedruk zou kunnen vergroten, afnam. Markten stabiliseren na volatiele bewegingen Goud liep op maandag de verliezen verder op en bereikte het laagste niveau in meer dan een maand, voordat het weer herstelde en de sessie licht hoger eindigde. De eerdere daling vond plaats te midden van toenemende inflatiezorgen die een uitverkoop op de wereldwijde obligatiemarkten in gang zetten. Beleggers leken dinsdag voorzichtiger nu markten probeerden te stabiliseren na scherpe schommelingen in grondstoffen, valuta's en staatsobligaties eerder in de week. “Het algemene thema op de markten vandaag is dat het stof van vrijdag aan het neerdalen is en dat markten proberen te bepalen waar ze daarna naartoe gaan, terwijl ze uitkijken naar risico's van gebeurtenissen midden in de week,” zei Ilya Spivak, hoofd global macro bij Tastylive, tegen Reuters. Marktparticipanten richten zich nu op de publicatie van de notulen van de vergadering van de Federal Reserve van april op woensdag, die verdere aanwijzingen kunnen geven over het beleidsvooruitzicht van de centrale bank. Spanningen in het Midden-Oosten blijven in de aandacht Trump zei dat hij een geplande aanval op Iran had opgeschort om onderhandelingen mogelijk te maken die gericht zijn op het beëindigen van het conflict tussen de VS en Iran, nadat Teheran naar verluidt een nieuw vredesvoorstel aan Washington had voorgelegd. De ontwikkeling droeg bij aan een daling van de olieprijzen, waarbij ruweoliebenchmarks meer dan 2% daalden nu de zorgen over directe verstoringen van het aanbod afnamen. Lagere olieprijzen hielpen enkele inflatiezorgen te temperen die aan het begin van de week onrust hadden veroorzaakt op de wereldmarkten. Goud wordt traditioneel gezien als een afdekking tegen inflatie en geopolitieke onzekerheid, hoewel hogere...

title: Índice Kospi cae ante el aumento de rendimientos de bonos surcoreanos: ¿comprar la caída?
content: El Índice Kospi retrocedió hacia una corrección mientras el reciente rally hace una pausa por preocupaciones de sobrecalentamiento. Retrocedió a KRW 7,250, un 10% por debajo del máximo del año de KRW 8,038. Sigue subiendo más de un 72% este año y un 178% en los últimos 12 meses. Entonces, ¿es este el final del rally del Índice Compuesto Kospi? Las acciones surcoreanas retroceden ante temores de sobrecalentamiento El Índice Kospi se ha retirado en los últimos días, pasando desde el máximo del año de KRW 8,038 a principios de este mes hasta los actuales KRW 7,250. Este retroceso ha coincidido con el creciente temor de que el rally haya provocado un sobrecalentamiento. Un buen ejemplo es el hecho de que algunos inversores extranjeros han seguido vendiendo sus acciones. Vendieron más de $13.2 billion en acciones la semana pasada, alimentando la volatilidad del mercado hasta un máximo histórico. Hay señales de que algunos inversores surcoreanos también han comenzado a vender sus participaciones. Además, estos inversores ya han visto crecer su patrimonio de forma exponencial desde el año pasado. Algunas de las acciones más calientes han bajado en los últimos días. Samsung Electronics cayó a KRW 277,500 desde el máximo del año de 299,000. Las acciones de SK Hynix se han desplomado a KRW 1.79 millones desde el máximo del año de KRW 2 millones. Todavía, los analistas creen que el Índice Kospi no está lo bastante caro. Por ejemplo, el índice tiene un ratio PER de alrededor de 27, unos puntos por encima del 23 del S&P 500. Además, el índice es más barato que el Nasdaq 100, que tiene un múltiplo de 35. Un posible catalizador para el índice son los resultados de NVIDIA que se publican el miércoles de esta semana. Unos números sólidos podrían señalar más ganancias en las acciones de semiconductores que beneficiarían a Samsung y SK Hynix. Los rendimientos de los bonos surcoreanos han subido Mientras tanto, hay preocupación porque los bonos surcoreanos han caído en los últimos meses. Los datos muestran que el rendimiento a diez años saltó al 4,30% desde el mínimo del año de 3,27%. De forma similar, los datos muestran que el rendimiento a cinco años ha subido al 4,06%. El aumento de los rendimientos de los bonos ha continuado en medio de la guerra en Irán, que ha empujado la inflación surcoreana al alza. Datos recientes muestran que la inflación en Corea del Sur subió al 2,6% en abril de este año mientras los...

title: ट्रंप के यू-टर्न पर ईरान का पलटवार – ‘खुद ही डेडलाइन तय करके हट जाता है पीछे’
Kospi faller när sydkoreanska obligationsräntor stiger: köpa dippen?
content: Kospi-indexet backade in i en korrektion när den senaste uppgången tar en paus i spåren av oro för överhettning. Det sjönk till KRW 7,250, ner 10% från årets högsta nivå på KRW 8,038. Det är fortfarande upp med över 72% i år och 178% under de senaste 12 månaderna. Är detta slutet på uppgången för Kospi-kompositindexet? Sydkoreanska aktier backar i spåren av överhettningsoro Kospi-indexet har dragit sig tillbaka de senaste dagarna och gått från årets högsta nivå på KRW 8,038 tidigare denna månad till nuvarande KRW 7,250. Denne nedgång har sammanfallit med växande farhågor om att uppgången lett till överhettning. Ett tydligt tecken är att vissa utländska investerare fortsatt säljer aktier. De dumpade över $13.2 miljarder i aktier förra veckan, vilket drev upp marknadsvolatiliteten till rekordnivåer. Det finns tecken på att även vissa sydkoreanska investerare har börjat sälja av. Dessutom har dessa placerare redan sett sin förmögenhet växa exponentiellt sedan förra året. Några av de hetaste aktierna har backat de senaste dagarna. Samsung Electronics föll till KRW 277,500 från årets högsta på 299,000. SK Hynix-aktien har sjunkit till KRW 1.79 miljoner från årets högsta på KRW 2 miljoner. Analytiker menar dock att Kospi-indexet fortfarande inte är tillräckligt dyrt. Indexet handlas till ett P/E-tal på omkring 27, ett par punkter över S&P 500-indexets 23. Dessutom är indexet billigare än Nasdaq 100, som har en multipel på 35. En potentiell katalysator för indexet är de kommande NVIDIA-rapporten som släpps på onsdag denna vecka. Stark rapport kan peka mot ytterligare uppgångar i halvledarsektorn som kan gynna Samsung och SK Hynix. Sydkoreanska obligationsräntor har stigit Samtidigt finns oro för att sydkoreanska obligationsräntor har stigit kraftigt de senaste månaderna. Data visar att tioårsräntan sköt upp till 4.30% från årets lägsta 3.27%. På samma sätt visar data att femårsräntan har stigit till 4.06%. De stigande obligationsräntorna har fortsatt i skuggan av det pågående Iran-kriget, vilket pressat upp den sydkoreanska inflationen. Nyare data visar att inflationen i Sydkorea steg till 2.6% i april i år då energikostnaderna förblir höga. Sydkoreanska bolag påverkas av de högre räntorna eftersom det ökar kostnaden för upplåning. Samtidigt har den sydkoreanska wonen fortsatt att försvagas de senaste dagarna. USD/KRW-paret steg till 1,505, dess högsta nivå sedan...

title: Festival Scienza Medica. Boom di presenze: oltre 1.200
content: Oltre 1.200 presenze, quattro premi Nobel e boom di studenti: il bilancio positivo dell’undicesima edizione del ’Festival della scienza medica’ , promosso dalla Fondazione Carisbo e realizzato in collaborazione con l’ Università . Una platea di cittadini, professionisti e studenti si è riunita in città durante i tre giorni dell’evento, da venerdì 15 a domenica 17, il cui tema era ’La nuova sanità: dalla prevenzione alla medicina di precisione’. Hanno seguito il festival circa 200 studenti dell’ateneo bolognese, provenienti anche dai campus di Ravenna e Forlì, con la possibilità di sostenere un esame che riconoscesse loro dei crediti formativi. Sul palco del complesso di Santa Lucia e dell’Ircss Rizzoli, sono saliti, con un programma di simposi e letture magistrali, oltre 60 esperti, provenienti dall’Italia e dall’estero, tra cui quattro premi nobel. "Avere a Bologna quattro premi Nobel, ci ha permesso di tracciare la strada in cui si muove la sanità del futuro", afferma Claudio Borghi, professore e responsabile scientifico del festival. Sono intervenuti il biologo svedese Svante Pääbo (nobel per la medicina 2022), gli scienziati Gregg L. Semenza e Sir Peter John Ratcliffe (nobel per la medicina 2019), e il chimico Stefan Walter Hell (nobel per la chimica 2014). Secondo Patrizia Pasini, presidente di fondazione Carisbo, "Uno degli obiettivi della fondazione è promuovere una divulgazione scientifica di alto livello, ma capace di semplificare il linguaggio medico". Ad arricchire l’evento, la presenza del cardinale Matteo Maria Zuppi , che sottolinea: "La medicina è, nel senso più nobile e profondo, la vera scienza della vita". Francesco Dei

Taioaliiseu Files Election Petition against Lautimuia Alleging Bribery and Treating
content: Faatuatua i le Atua Samoa ua Tasi unsuccessful candidate Taioaliiseu Fiti Aimaasu has filed a post-election petition against Independent candidate Lautimuia Afoa Uelese Vaai. The Supreme Court received the filed petition on Monday afternoon 18 May 2026. Counsel Magele Leone Su’a Mailo confirmed Taioaliiseu filed 13 allegations of bribery and 1 allegation of treating against Lautimuia. The FAST party candidate is alleging Lautimuia handed money directly to voters and gave away boxes of corned beef and tinned fish to voters. The petitioner has not yet served the respondent with the allegation. Once served, Lautimuia has five working days to provide his response. Lautimuia polled 1695 votes, winning by a landslide while Taioaliiseu secured 949 votes in the Vaimauga 3 by-election. The by-election was triggered when Taioaliiseu resigned from HRPP to join the FAST party. The post Taioaliiseu Files Election Petition against Lautimuia Alleging Bribery and Treating first appeared on Samoa Global News .

Magyar government to decide on the fate of non-EU guest workers next week, but outlook is not promising
content: Péter Magyar said during the parliamentary election campaign that he does not want Hungary to remain an assembly-line economy with low value-added jobs. He believes the Hungarian economy should create more high value-added positions. As a result, fewer non-EU guest workers would be needed, while more Hungarians could return home from abroad. Péter Magyar’s government aims to create high value-added jobs New Economy and Energy Minister István Kapitány and Finance Minister András Kármán share the view that Hungary should become a modern economy built on high value-added jobs. Experts agree that they would seek to attract such investments, rather than creating new jobs in sectors such as manufacturing or processing. The Orbán governments took a different approach. They aimed to create as many jobs as possible through investments from all parts of the world — including large-scale projects from China and India — mostly generating low-paid employment. As a result, many Hungarians moved abroad in search of higher wages. The surge in investment led to sectoral labour shortages, and vacant positions were filled by non-EEA guest workers. Their number has now reached over 120,000–130,000. Illustration. Guest workers very much needed in the processing industry. Featured image: depositphotos.com As we wrote in a separate article, their presence is essential to Hungary’s economy, even in sectors such as healthcare, where their numbers are relatively low. Due to chronic labour shortages, their absence could significantly affect service levels. In the processing industry, guest workers are indispensable, as they are in Hungarian agriculture — particularly during harvest periods — and in livestock farming, including cattle herding and the dairy sector. Guest workers’ fate to be decided next week The Magyar government said during the election campaign that it would halt the inflow of guest workers from 1 June and review the entire system. The issue was also raised at yesterday’s cabinet meeting. According to a government spokesperson, a decision on restricting the employment of guest workers from outside the European Union is expected at a cabinet meeting next week. Yesterday the press conference was held by PM Péter Magyar and the government spokespersons together. Photo: MTI/Hegedüs Róbert Have you read this? Hanceville council talks parks, new generator, rezoning, more
content: HANCEVILLE, Ala. – The Hanceville City Council at its Thursday, May 14, spoke about park improvements, a new generator, rezoning and more. The Council discussed a $310,000 bid for fencing adjustment options at C.W. Day Park. The work would replace rusted fencing around the park, tennis courts and ball field complex. “That’s a lot of money for a fence that isn’t falling down,” said Mayor Nolan Bradford. The Council said residents expressed that the fence is in need of work and is essential to public attraction and to bring in revenue. The Council came to an agreement to negotiate the price of the bid and revisit the matter at a future meeting. Next up was the approval of a maintenance contract and purchase of a new generator for city hall for $1,248. The Council said the current generator is roughly two years old and, per professional opinion, doesn’t need to exceed three years of age due to a multitude of issues that can arise. Council members discussed rezoning recommendation for a portion of Elm Street due to houses that will be built in the area. “This is at the end of Elm Street on the dirt road by the church,” Bradford stated. “This went from one lot to four lots, which means (rezoning) from R1 to R2. So we will need to have a public hearing on that. Not at the next meeting, but the one after that.” The Council discussed the matter and decided to schedule the public hearing for Thursday, June 11, 2026. Regarding an American Legion donation, Bradford suggested the Council take no action at this time. An invoice from Fuller, Willingham & Carter, which was for billing that wasn’t addressed in 2025, was approved for payment. Two people were appointed to the library board. Councilwoman Kim Brown motioned for Lauren Bentley to be approved for place 4 and Cathi Bradford to take place 5, with each serving a term of four years. Both appointments were approved. The Council discussed the possibility of enrolling a member in a three-year class for community development training. The class would cost roughly $1,800 and is aimed at community leaders, council members and city workers who want to be more educated about grants. Bradford advised that Councilman Robert Powell would likely be selected for the program, although the Council voted to table the discussion for now. The Council had a first reading of a procurement policy for federal funds. Regarding Azul Tequila Mexican Cantina, LLC, alcohol license, the Council set a public hearing for Thursday, May 28. The...

L'indice Kospi recule alors que les rendements obligataires sud‐coréens bondissent : acheter la baisse ?
content: L'indice Kospi est entré en correction alors que le récent rallye marque une pause en raison de craintes de surchauffe. Il est retombé à KRW 7,250, en baisse de 10 % par rapport au plus haut de l'année à KRW 8,038. Il affiche toutefois une progression de plus de 72 % cette année et de 178 % sur les 12 derniers mois. Alors, s'agit‐il de la fin du rallye de l'indice composite Kospi ? Les actions sud‐coréennes reculent face aux risques de surchauffe Le Kospi s'est replié ces derniers jours, passant du plus haut depuis le début de l'année à KRW 8,038 au début du mois au niveau actuel de KRW 7,250. Ce recul coïncide avec l'intensification des craintes selon lesquelles le rallye aurait provoqué une surchauffe. Un bon exemple est le fait que certains investisseurs étrangers ont continué de vendre leurs actions. Ils ont écoulé pour plus de 13,2 milliards de dollars la semaine dernière, alimentant une volatilité record sur le marché. Des signes montrent également que certains investisseurs sud‐coréens ont commencé à vendre leurs titres. De plus, ces investisseurs ont déjà vu leur patrimoine croître de façon exponentielle depuis l'an dernier. Certaines des valeurs les plus en vue ont reculé ces derniers jours. Samsung Electronics a chuté à KRW 277,500 depuis le plus haut de l'année à 299,000. Les actions SK Hynix ont plongé à KRW 1,79 million depuis le plus haut de l'année à KRW 2 million. Pour autant, les analystes estiment que le Kospi n'est pas encore trop cher. Par exemple, l'indice affiche un PER d'environ 27, quelques points au‐dessus des 23 du S&P 500. En outre, l'indice reste moins cher que le Nasdaq 100, dont le multiple est de 35. Un catalyseur potentiel pour l'indice est la publication des résultats de NVIDIA prévue mercredi cette semaine. Des chiffres solides pourraient relancer les gains des titres de semi‐conducteurs et profiter à Samsung et SK Hynix. Les rendements obligataires sud‐coréens ont bondi Parallèlement, des inquiétudes subsistent concernant les obligations sud‐coréennes, qui ont été vendues ces derniers mois. Les données montrent que le rendement à dix ans a grimpé à 4,30 % depuis le plus bas de l'année à 3,27 %. De même, le rendement à cinq ans est passé à 4,06 %. La hausse des rendements obligataires s'est poursuivie dans le contexte de la guerre en Iran, qui a poussé l'inflation sud‐coréenne à la hausse. Les données récentes indiquent que l'inflation en Corée du Sud est...

title: San Biagio, cacciatori sparano. I pallini finiscono nelle case vicine
content: Hanno sentito piccoli rumori, sordi, contro i vetri delle proprie abitazioni. Si sono avvicinati e hanno visto i segni dei pallini sparati da cacciatori. Da quando è aperta la caccia disguidi e criticità sono state segnalate diverse volte anche alle forze dell’ordine ma mai come domenica mattina presto tra l’Aspio e San Biagio di Osimo. In pratica i cacciatori si sarebbero avvicinati troppo alle case, scatenando le preoccupazioni degli abitanti che hanno chiamato la Polizia. Un problema che appunto si ripropone con gli stessi toni accesi ogni anno. La legge prevederebbe una distanza minima di 100 metri dalle case per i cacciatori, 50 dalle strade. Se sparano in direzione delle case, la distanza minima è 150 metri. Anche a Numana sono scattate le proteste, con tanto di segnalazione telefonica ai carabinieri. I cacciatori potrebbero comunque aver agito nel rispetto delle regole nonostante il rumore degli spari si sia sentito troppo vicino, facendo presumere una pericolosa violazione. La paura è stata grande, quei residenti stavolta andranno fino in fondo e dopo aver avvertito il Comune si riservano di chiamare carabinieri e Forestale. A Villa Musone di Loreto si è manifestato lo stesso problema, così come nei pressi della Selva di Castelfidardo dove diverse persone si addentrano, complici le belle giornate, per fare jogging o portare il cane a fare un giro. Era il 2021, di questo periodo, a Osimo, in zona Santo Stefano, quando fu sfiorata la tragedia. Lo sparo partito dal fucile di un cacciatore ha raggiunto la spalla da un residente. A raccontarlo è stata la moglie, impaurita.
