IPL 2026 Playoffs Scenario: सनराइजर्स हैदराबाद से हार के बाद भी प्लेऑफ खेल सकती है CSK, ये है समीकरण
content: IPL 2026 के प्लेऑफ में 4 टीमों के लिए जगह है. 3 टीमों के नाम तय हो चुके हैं. RCB ने तो सबसे पहले ही प्लेऑफ का टिकट कटा लिया था. 18 मई को चेन्नई सुपर किंग्स को हराने के बाद सनराइजर्स हैदराबाद ने भी खुद के साथ-साथ गुजरात टाइटंस के प्लेऑफ का टिकट कन्फर्म करा दिया. अब सवाल है कि आखिरी एक स्थान के लिए किस टीम को मौका मिलेगा? चेन्नई सुपर किंग्स के लिए प्लेऑफ में जाने का सबसे बढ़िया तरीका था जीत. उसे ग्रुप स्टेज के अपने आखिरी दोनों मुकाबले जीतने थे. मगर ऐसा हुआ नहीं. आखिरी 2 में से सनराइजर्स के खिलाफ खेला एक मुकाबला वो हार गए. हालांकि, CSK के फैंस के लिए अच्छी बात ये है कि SRH से हार के बाद भी उनकी टीम प्लेऑफ खेल सकती है. SRH से हारकर भी CSK कैसे खेलेगी प्लेऑफ? अब सवाल है कि ऐसा होगा कैसे? सनराइजर्स से मुकाबला गंवाने के बाद भी CSK प्लेऑफ का टिकट कैसे कटा सकती है? जबकि अगर वो गुजरात टाइटंस के खिलाफ आखिरी मुकाबला जीतते भी हैं तो भी उनके 14 अंक ही होंगे. SRH से हार के बाद चेन्नई सुपर किंग्स को प्लेऑफ में पहुंचने के लिए अब खुद तो आखिरी मैच जीतना ही होगा. उसके अलावा दूसरी टीमों के प्रदर्शन पर भी नजर रखनी होगी. सनराइजर्स हैदराबाद से हार के बाद चेन्नई सुपर किंग्स का प्लेऑफ में पहुंचना तभी संभव हो सकता है, जब पंजाब किंग्स अपना आखिरी ग्रुप मैच हार जाए. ऐसा हुआ तो उसके 14 मैचों में 13 अंक ही रहेंगे. राजस्थान अपने आखिरी दोनों मैच हार जाए या कम से कम एक मुकाबला जरूर गंवाए. ऐसा हुआ तो राजस्थान के 12 अंक ही रहेंगे या ज्यादा से ज्यादा 14 अंक होंगे. दिल्ली कैपिटल्स का नेट रन रेट खराब है. इसलिए उससे CSK की सेहत पर असर नहीं पड़ने वाला.KKR को भी अपने आखिरी ग्रुप मैच में हार का सामना करना पड़ेगा और इन सबके अलावा CSK के लिए जो सबसे जरूरी है, वो है उसका अपने आखिरी मैच को जीतना. CSK को अपने अंतिम मैच में जीत के साथ रन रेट भी सुधारना होगा चेन्नई सुपर किंग्स के 12 मैचों में 13 अंक है और वो पॉइंट्स टेबल में छठे नंबर पर है. लेकिन, आखिरी मुकाबला जीतकर 14 अंक के साथ वो प्लेऑफ का टिकट कटा सकती है. हालांकि, आखिरी मुकाबले में CSK को अपने नेट रन रेट का भी ध्यान रखना होगा, जो सनराइजर्स से हार के बाद माइनस में चली गई है. पंजाब-राजस्थान का क्या है समीकरण? CSK के अलावा पंजाब और राजस्थान के पास प्लेऑफ में पहुंचने का मौका है. पंजाब किंग्स को प्लेऑफ में जाने के लिए अपना आखिरी मुकाबला जीतना होगा और ये दुआ करनी होगी कि राजस्थान रॉयल्स अपने अगले दो मैचों में से एक हार जाए. वहीं राजस्थान रॉयल्स के लिए प्लेऑफ में जाने का सीधा और सिंपल रास्ता ये है कि वो अपने बचे हुए दोनों मुकाबले जीत ले.

title: Gettava sfalci nel parco, mega-multa da 4mila euro
content: Giro di vite contro l’abbandono dei rifiuti all’interno del parco regionale del Monte San Bartolo . Grazie ad un accordo tra l’Ente Parco e i carabinieri Forestali , nei giorni scorsi sono scattate le prime sanzioni: una, da 4mila euro. Dopo settimane di controlli, i primi verbali sono stati elevati nei confronti di due trasgressori sorpresi a lasciare ingenti quantitativi di sfalci vegetali ai margini della strada. "Abbiamo deciso di alzare il livello di guardia contro una pratica che negli anni è stata troppo spesso tollerata – sostiene l’Ente Parco in una nota - . L’abbandono indiscriminato di rifiuti, dagli sfalci verdi fino agli elettrodomestici, in una delle aree naturalistiche più preziose del territorio è una pratica che va contrastata. Per questo, l’Ente Parco ha stretto un accordo con i Carabinieri Forestali, i quali, grazie ai sistemi di monitoraggio e di sorveglianza presenti nel parco, sono risaliti alle identità dei trasgressori". Una volta individuati i numeri di targa dei veicoli di chi ha effettuato gli abbandoni, il gioco era fatto. In pochi giorni sono così state due i multati per aver scaricato grandi quantità di sfalci vegetali vicino alla strada: uno dei due episodi è stato giudicato dai Forestali di elevata gravità, tanto da portare i Carabinieri ad elevare una sanzione di 4mila euro. Oltre al pagamento della multa, i responsabili dovranno inoltre pulire personalmente l’area in cui hanno effettuato gli abbandoni e ripristinare lo stato dei luoghi. Ma i controlli, assicura infatti l’Ente Parco, sono solo all’inizio. "Il messaggio è chiaro – prosegue la nota - . Sul San Bartolo, per i furbetti dei rifiuti, la tolleranza è finita". Anche nelle ultime ore, sono stati immortalati alcuni trasgressori che hanno abbandonato letti e materassi lungo le strade del parco e i Forestali stanno ora procedendo alla identificazione. "Il fenomeno dell’abbandono dei rifiuti sul San Bartolo è stato tollerato fin troppo a lungo – sostiene il presidente dell’Ente Parco, Silvano Leva –. Non possiamo consentire a un gruppo sparuto di incivili di trasformare un paradiso terrestre in una discarica. Non vogliamo fare cassa, ma disincentivare il fenomeno".

title: 周吉佩衣錦還鄉廣州巡唱 剖白心聲感觸落淚
content: 周吉佩(吉吉)於5月16日帶着《延續.第三人生》演唱會衣錦還鄉來到廣州,與一眾「吉士粉」及觀眾度過感動又熱鬧的晚上。吉吉罕有剖白心聲,更忍不住落淚他自爆曾因得獎後遇反對聲音懷疑自己,承受無比壓力,更影嚮了太太及小朋友,他感謝歌迷這幾年對他不離不棄,讓他由黑暗走向光明,並兩度向樂迷鞠躬致謝,相當感人。 周吉佩(吉吉)於5月16日帶着《延續.第三人生》演唱會「衣錦還鄉」到廣州。 與「吉士粉」度過感動又熱鬧的晚上。 串燒廣東金曲 致敬Beyond 由「尚梯娛樂」主辦、「詩琳美容」冠名呈獻的周吉佩《延續.第三人生》演唱會-廣州在剛過去的星期六,於正佳大劇院・尚梯館演出。身穿一身紫色長褸的吉吉在樂迷的尖叫聲下出場,以一曲《祝君好》為演唱會揭開序幕,緊接的《深愛著你》,全場樂迷跟着和唱,氣氛高漲。吉吉亦高呼:「終於嚟到廣州喇!由香港去澳門來到今日廣州站,多謝大家陪我去好多地方,呢幾年走過來不容易,感受到大家的愛有增無減。」隨即向樂迷們鞠躬以示謝意! 吉吉出道時曾以樂隊姿態入行,演唱會上,他唱出Beyond的歌曲致敬,及後更換上紅色閃片西裝,大騷胸肌,唱出. 《找片天空接收我們》及《手機關掉的一刻》等歌曲,有歌迷大叫要求他再解一粒鈕,吉吉笑說:「已經好低,冇乜嘢睇!再解就露點喇!」全場大笑。接着,吉吉換上一身白色服裝,自彈自唱《高山低谷》、《陪著你走》,期間忍不住感觸落淚。他拭著淚說:「好叻㗎喇!過去經歴好多,我忍到最後先喊出嚟!」 他自爆奪冠後曾因反對聲音懷疑自己,承受無比壓力,更影響了太太及小朋友。 說到此處忍不住落淚。 吉吉回想在《中年好聲音》奪冠後,很多聲音說他不值、爆冷。他說:「到賽後第三天,反對聲音太勁,特別在夜䦨人靜時意志好低,會有負面想法。所以,好多謝你哋比力量我,見到你哋咁支持我,點解重要拘泥網上唔識嘅人,好多謝呢幾年你哋對我不離不棄,讓我由黑暗走向光明。」吉吉剖白內心感受,指自己家人,包括太太及小朋友都受到影響。 他兩度向樂迷鞠躬致謝,感謝大家不離不棄,讓他由黑暗走向光明。 感謝太太及爸爸 越講越喊 他哽咽着說:「我好多謝我太太,知道佢好大壓力,試過我拍節目時打電話比佢,佢連講一句說話都驚比人鬧,我知佢付出咗好多,我會報答佢,今年都買咗好多嘢比佢。我亦要多謝爸爸!死啦!越講越喊。」 吉吉又指很開心終於返到兒時家鄉廣州這個地方演出,他本身籍貫是新會,他說:「今晚廣州的鄉親父老都有嚟!我可以大聲咁講,終於有少少出人頭地返到嚟,話比大家知我係歌手。」 尾聲他唱出《第三人生》與觀眾齊放紙飛機,期望盡快在香港或各地再見。 真情剖白 淚灑舞台 演唱會尾聲,吉吉唱出《第三人生》,並與觀眾齊放出紙飛機,期望演唱會盡快飛到下一站,可以在香港或其他地方跟大家再見面。最後的Encore環節,他以《我的親愛》及《無言感激》,並第二度向樂迷們鞠躬作結,為廣州站演唱會劃上圓滿句號。

title: ارتفاع اليوريا العادي 2427 جنيها، أسعار الأسمدة اليوم في الأسواق
content: ارتفاع اليوريا العادي 2427 جنيها، أسعار الأسمدة اليوم في الأسواق أسعار الأسمدة اليوم في الأسواق، سجلت أسعار الأسمدة في السوق المحلية، اليوم الثلاثاء، تباينًا ملحوظًا، وذلك وفق أحدث تقرير صادر عن بوابة الأسعار المحلية والعالمية التابعة لمركز المعلومات ودعم اتخاذ القرار. ويأتي هذا التباين رغم استمرار الأزمة الناتجة عن نشاط السوق السوداء، وارتفاع مستويات الطلب مقارنة بالمعروض الرسمي. أسعار الأسمدة اليوم وتستعرض «فيتو» أحدث تحركات أسعار نترات النشادر وسلفات النشادر واليوريا بأنواعها العادية والمخصوص، اليوم الثلاثاء، الموافق 19 مايو 2026، في السطور التالية: أولًا: أسعار نترات النشادر اليوم نترات النشادر 33.5% مخصوص بلغ متوسط سعر نترات النشادر المخصوص نحو 24705 جنيهات للطن، بارتفاع 146 جنيهًا عن سعره السابق، فيما تراوحت أسعار طن النترات المخصوص من 20 ألف جنيه إلى 30 ألف جنيه للطن. نترات النشادر 33.5% عادي وفيما يخص أسعار طن النترات العادي، فبلغ متوسط السعر نحو 13797 جنيهًا للطن، بارتفاع 1734 جنيهًا عن سعره السابق، بينما تراوحت أسعار النترات العادي من 4700 جنيه إلى 30 ألف جنيه للطن. ثانيًا: أسعار سلفات النشادر اليوم سلفات النشادر 20.6% مخصوص وعن أسعار طن سلفات النشادر المخصوص؛ فبلغ متوسط السعر نحو 19557 جنيهًا للطن، بارتفاع 1393 جنيها عن سعره السابق، فيما تراوحت أسعار السلفات المخصوص من 5300 جنيه إلى 30 ألف جنيه للطن. ثالثًا: أسعار اليوريا اليوم يوريا 46.5% مخصوص فيما بلغ متوسط سعر اليوريا المخصوص نحو 25347 جنيهًا للطن، بانخفاض 138 جنيها عن سعره السابق، بينما تراوحت أسعار طن اليوريا المخصوص من 19800 جنيه إلى 30 ألف جنيه للطن. يوريا 46.5% عادي أما اليوريا العادي، فبلغ متوسط السعر نحو 14243 جنيهًا للطن، بارتفاع 2427 جنيهًا عن سعره السابق، فيما تراوحت أسعار طن اليوريا العادي من 4800 جنيه إلى 30 ألف جنيه للطن.
creator: فيتو

title: L’Uomo vitruviano arriva a Fano. Giuli annuncia il super prestito
content: di Tiziana Petrelli L’estate fanese avrà il volto, le braccia e la perfezione geometrica dell’ Uomo vitruviano di Leonardo da Vinci . L’annuncio è arrivato ieri dal ministro della Cultura Alessandro Giuli, nel cuore del cantiere archeologico di piazza Andrea Costa, davanti agli scavi che stanno riportando alla luce i resti riconducibili alla Basilica progettata da Vitruvio nel I secolo avanti Cristo. "La novità che sono lieto di annunciare – ha detto il ministro – è che l’estate fanese avrà come protagonista l’Uomo vitruviano di Leonardo: verrà esposto qui per alcuni giorni, grazie alla collaborazione delle Gallerie dell’Accademia di Venezia". Il disegno di Leonardo è talmente delicato e fragile che il suo spostamento rappresenta una circostanza assolutamente rara, tanto che l’ultima volta, ciò è avvenuto nel 2019. L’arrivo dell’Uomo vitruviano porta in città il simbolo più universale del legame tra Leonardo e Vitruvio. Un gesto dal forte valore simbolico: l’opera leonardesca e la Basilica descritta dall’architetto romano tornano idealmente a incontrarsi nello stesso luogo, proprio mentre gli scavi cercano le tracce dell’unico edificio che Vitruvio affermò di aver seguito direttamente nella realizzazione. Giuli è arrivato poco dopo le 13.30, sotto un sole già estivo. Ad attenderlo, nel parcheggio davanti al Politeama, c’era tutta la città istituzionale: il prefetto Emanuela Saveria Greco, il questore Francesca Montereali, il sindaco Luca Serfilippi con la giunta, il presidente della Regione Francesco Acquaroli, l’onorevole Antonio Baldelli, i vertici della Soprintendenza, le forze dell’ordine e i rappresentanti delle fondazioni cittadine. Da lì il piccolo corteo si è mosso a piedi verso piazza Andrea Costa, con il ministro accompagnato e guidato dal soprintendente Archeologia, Belle Arti e Paesaggio per Ancona e Pesaro Urbino Andrea Pessina. "Il rinvenimento della Basilica descritta da Vitruvio rappresenta una scoperta di eccezionale valore scientifico – ha sottolineato Giuli –. L’antica Fanum è stata un modello architettonico della civiltà occidentale e le Marche si confermano uno scrigno prezioso della nostra storia". Il ministro ha ribadito che il Ministero della Cultura "farà la propria parte", sostenendo e tutelando l’archeologia del territorio. Per il sindaco quella di ieri è stata "una giornata storica per la nostra città perché conferma l’attenzione nazionale verso la Basilica di Vitruvio e verso il percorso che Fano sta...

title: 교육·안전으로 다시 선 '길 위의 시의원', 윤지성
لهذا السبب رفض النازحون الانتقال من وسط بيروت
Dlaczego inwestorzy w złoto w tym tygodniu nagle stają się ostrożni?
content: Ceny złota niewiele się zmieniły we wtorek, gdy inwestorzy zrobili sobie przerwę po ostatniej zmienności na rynkach i zwrócili uwagę na wydarzenia na Bliskim Wschodzie oraz nadchodzące sygnały ze strony Rezerwy Federalnej dotyczące stóp procentowych. Spotowe złoto straciło 0.1% do $4,560.39 za uncję o 0228 GMT, podczas gdy amerykańskie kontrakty futures na złoto z dostawą w czerwcu na COMEX w Nowym Jorku lekko wzrosły o 0.1% do $4,563.10 za uncję. Nastrój na rynkach odzwierciedlał decyzję prezydenta USA Donalda Trumpa o wstrzymaniu planowanego ataku na Iran, co złagodziło bezpośrednie obawy przed szerszą eskalacją regionalną, która mogłaby zakłócić rynki energetyczne i nasilić presje inflacyjne na świecie. Rynki stabilizują się po gwałtownych ruchach W poniedziałek złoto pogłębiło straty i osiągnęło najniższy poziom od ponad miesiąca, zanim odrobiło część i zamknęło sesję nieco wyżej. Wcześniejszy spadek był związany z narastającymi obawami o inflację, które wywołały wyprzedaż na światowych rynkach obligacji. We wtorek inwestorzy wydawali się bardziej ostrożni, gdy rynki próbowały się ustabilizować po gwałtownych wahaniach w surowcach, walutach i długu skarbowym na początku tygodnia. „Ogólna tendencja na rynkach jest dziś taka, że kurz opada po piątku, a rynki próbują ustalić, dokąd zmierzają dalej, oczekując na ryzyko związane z wydarzeniami w środku tygodnia” — powiedział Reutersowi Ilya Spivak, szef ds. globalnego makro w Tastylive. Uczestnicy rynku skupiają się teraz na publikacji protokołu ze spotkania Rezerwy Federalnej z kwietnia w środę, który może dostarczyć dalszych wskazówek co do perspektyw polityki banku centralnego. Napięcia na Bliskim Wschodzie nadal w centrum uwagi Trump powiedział, że wstrzymał planowany atak na Iran, aby umożliwić negocjacje mające na celu zakończenie konfliktu USA–Iran, po tym jak Teheran podobno przedstawił Waszyngtonowi nowe propozycje pokojowe. Rozwój wydarzeń przyczynił się do spadku cen ropy, a wskaźniki cen ropy surowej spadły o ponad 2%, gdy złagodziły się obawy o bezpośrednie zakłócenia podaży. Niższe ceny ropy pomogły ostudzić część obaw inflacyjnych, które niepokoiły rynki światowe na początku tygodnia. Złoto tradycyjnie postrzegane jest jako zabezpieczenie przed inflacją i niepewnością geopolityczną, choć wyższe stopy procentowe zazwyczaj zmniejszają atrakcyjność metalu nieprzynoszącego dochodu. Perspektywy...

title: Varför blir guldhandlare plötsligt mer försiktiga den här veckan?
content: Guldpriserna var i stort sett oförändrade på tisdagen när investerare tog en paus efter den senaste marknadsvolatiliteten och riktade sin uppmärksamhet mot utvecklingen i Mellanöstern och kommande signaler från Federal Reserve om räntorna. Spotpriset på guld sjönk 0.1% till $4,560.39 per uns vid 0228 GMT, medan US gold futures för juni leverans steg 0.1% till $4,563.10 per uns på COMEX i New York. Marknadstonen följde USA:s president Donald Trumps beslut att pausa en planerad militärattack mot Iran, vilket dämpade omedelbara rädslor för en bredare regional upptrappning som skulle kunna störa energimarknaderna och förstärka inflationspressen globalt. Marknaderna stabiliserar sig efter volatila rörelser Guldet förlängde förlusterna på måndagen och nådde sin lägsta nivå på mer än en månad innan det återhämtade sig och avslutade sessionen något högre. Den tidigare nedgången kom i samband med ökade inflationsbekymmer som utlöste en utförsäljning över de globala obligationsmarknaderna. Investerare verkade mer försiktiga på tisdagen när marknaderna försökte stabilisera sig efter kraftiga svängningar i råvaror, valutor och statsskuld tidigare i veckan. ”Det övergripande temat på marknaderna i dag är att dammet lägger sig efter fredagen och att marknaderna försöker lista ut vart de går härnäst samtidigt som de ser mot händelser under mitten av veckan”, sade Ilya Spivak, chef för global makro på Tastylive, till Reuters. Marknadsaktörer fokuserar nu på offentliggörandet av Federal Reserves protokoll från aprilmötet på onsdag, som kan ge ytterligare ledtrådar om centralbankens penningpolitiska utsikter. Spänningarna i Mellanöstern förblir i fokus Trump sade att han hade pausat en planerad attack mot Iran för att möjliggöra förhandlingar som syftar till att få slut på konflikten mellan USA och Iran, efter att Teheran enligt uppgift lämnat in ett nytt fredsförslag till Washington. Utvecklingen bidrog till ett fall i oljepriserna, där råoljebenchmarks sjönk med mer än 2% när farhågorna om omedelbara leveransstörningar lättade. Lägre oljepriser bidrog till att dämpa vissa inflationsoro som hade skakat globala marknader i början av veckan. Guld ses traditionellt som en säkring mot inflation och geopolitiska osäkerheter, även om högre räntor vanligtvis minskar attraktionskraften hos denna icke-avkastande metall. Fed-utblick och ledarskapsförändringar bevakas Man förväntar sig...

Pourquoi les traders de l'or se montrent-ils soudainement prudents cette semaine ?
content: Les cours de l'or ont peu varié mardi, les investisseurs faisant une pause après la récente volatilité des marchés et se tournant vers les développements au Moyen-Orient ainsi que vers les prochains signaux de la Réserve fédérale concernant les taux d'intérêt. L'or au comptant a reculé de 0,1 % à $4,560.39 l'once à 0228 GMT, tandis que les contrats à terme américains sur l'or à livraison en juin ont légèrement progressé de 0,1 % à $4,563.10 l'once sur le COMEX à New York. Le ton du marché a suivi la décision du président américain Donald Trump de suspendre une frappe militaire planifiée contre l'Iran, atténuant les craintes immédiates d'une escalade régionale plus large susceptible de perturber les marchés de l'énergie et d'intensifier les pressions inflationnistes à l'échelle mondiale. Les marchés se stabilisent après des mouvements volatils L'or a prolongé ses pertes lundi pour atteindre son plus bas niveau depuis plus d'un mois, avant de se redresser et de clôturer la séance en légère hausse. Le repli initial est intervenu dans un contexte de préoccupations croissantes sur l'inflation, qui ont déclenché une vente massive sur les marchés obligataires mondiaux. Les investisseurs semblaient plus prudents mardi, alors que les marchés tentaient de se stabiliser après de fortes fluctuations dans les matières premières, les devises et la dette souveraine en début de semaine. « Le thème général sur les marchés aujourd'hui est que la poussière retombe depuis vendredi et que les marchés essaient de déterminer où aller ensuite, en regardant vers les risques d'événements en milieu de semaine », a déclaré Ilya Spivak, responsable macro global chez Tastylive, à Reuters. Les acteurs du marché se concentrent désormais sur la publication, mercredi, des procès-verbaux de la réunion d'avril de la Réserve fédérale, qui pourraient fournir de nouveaux indices sur les perspectives de la politique monétaire de la banque centrale. Les tensions au Moyen-Orient restent au centre de l'attention Trump a déclaré avoir suspendu une attaque planifiée contre l'Iran afin de permettre des négociations visant à mettre fin au conflit entre les États-Unis et l'Iran, après que Téhéran a, selon des rapports, soumis une nouvelle proposition de paix à Washington. Le développement a contribué à une baisse des prix du pétrole, les indices de référence du brut chutant de plus de 2 % alors que les craintes de...

title: ¿Por qué los operadores de oro se han vuelto cautelosos esta semana?
content: Los precios del oro apenas variaron el martes, ya que los inversores hicieron una pausa tras la reciente volatilidad del mercado y centraron su atención en los acontecimientos en Oriente Medio y en las próximas señales de la Reserva Federal sobre los tipos de interés. El oro al contado bajó un 0,1% hasta $4,560.39 la onza a las 0228 GMT, mientras que los futuros de oro estadounidenses para entrega en junio subieron un 0,1% hasta $4,563.10 la onza en el COMEX de Nueva York. El tono del mercado siguió la decisión del presidente de EE. UU., Donald Trump, de posponer un ataque militar planeado contra Irán, lo que alivió los temores inmediatos de una escalada regional más amplia que podría perturbar los mercados energéticos e intensificar las presiones inflacionarias a nivel mundial. Los mercados se estabilizan tras movimientos volátiles El oro amplió las pérdidas el lunes y tocó su nivel más bajo en más de un mes antes de recuperarse para cerrar la sesión ligeramente al alza. La caída anterior se produjo en medio de crecientes preocupaciones por la inflación que provocaron una venta masiva en los mercados de bonos globales. Los inversores parecían más cautelosos el martes, cuando los mercados intentaban estabilizarse tras las fuertes oscilaciones en materias primas, divisas y deuda soberana a principios de semana. «El tema general en los mercados hoy es que el polvo se está asentando desde el viernes y los mercados están tratando de averiguar hacia dónde irán a continuación mientras miran hacia el riesgo de eventos a mitad de semana», dijo a Reuters Ilya Spivak, jefe de macro global en Tastylive. Los participantes del mercado están ahora centrados en la publicación de las actas de la reunión de la Reserva Federal de abril, el miércoles, que podrían ofrecer más pistas sobre la perspectiva de política del banco central. Las tensiones en Oriente Medio siguen en el punto de mira Trump dijo que había pospuesto un ataque planeado contra Irán para permitir negociaciones destinadas a poner fin al conflicto entre EE. UU. e Irán, después de que Teherán supuestamente presentara una nueva propuesta de paz a Washington. El desarrollo contribuyó a la caída de los precios del petróleo, con los referentes del crudo bajando más del 2% al disiparse las preocupaciones por interrupciones inmediatas del suministro. Los precios más bajos del petróleo ayudaron a calmar algunas preocupaciones inflacionarias que habían inquietado a los...

أفضل سعر خلال 30 يومًا لوصول لابتوب MSI المخصص للألعاب بمعالج RTX 5080 وشاشة 4K وذاكرة DDR5 64 جيجابايت
content: دليل الكمبيوتر الشخصي مدعوم بالقارئ. عند الشراء من خلال الروابط على موقعنا، قد نكسب عمولة تابعة. اقرأ المزيد اكتشف قوة وأداء الكمبيوتر المحمول MSI Stealth 18 بوصة للألعاب انخفض سعر جهاز الكمبيوتر المحمول MSI Stealth المخصص للألعاب، والذي يأتي بشاشة كبيرة مقاس 18 بوصة، بمقدار 350 دولارًا عبر موقع Newegg ليصل إلى 3,349.00 دولار، وهو أقل سعر له في آخر 30 يومًا. على الرغم من كلفته المرتفعة، فإن مميزاته الفريدة تجعله يستحق الاستثمار حقًا، خصوصًا لمن يبحثون عن أداء قوي وتجربة احترافية في الألعاب والإنتاجية. هذا الجهاز المزود بمعالج Intel Core Ultra 9 275HX وذاكرة DDR5 بسعة 64 جيجابايت، إلى جانب بطاقة الرسومات RTX 5080 وشاشة 4K 120 هرتز معتمد من VESA DisplayHDR 1000، يوفر تجربة بصريات وصوت لا مثيل لها وعدد إطارات عالي للألعاب الحديثة. بطاقة رسومات RTX 5080 لتحقيق أداء فائق مع ذاكرة GDDR7 VRAM بسعة 16 جيجابايت، تعد بطاقة RTX 5080 قوة حقيقية للألعاب بدقة QHD+ و4K، مما يمنح المستخدم تجربة سلسة وخالية من التلعثم، مع إمكانية الاستفادة من تقنية MFG الخاصة. كما توفر البطاقة معالجة متطورة للمبدعين المحترفين في مجالات تحرير الفيديو والنمذجة ثلاثية الأبعاد، مما يجعلها خيارًا مثاليًا لإنجاز المهام الإبداعية الثقيلة خارج بيئة المكاتب التقليدية. معالج Intel Core Ultra 9 275HX متطور لأداء متفوق يتميز المعالج بوجود 24 نواة (8 أداء + 16 كفاءة)، وسرعة معززة تصل إلى 5.4 جيجاهرتز، وذاكرة تخزين مؤقت L3 بسعة 36 ميجابايت، مع وحدة NPU مخصصة لتعزيز مهام الذكاء الاصطناعي. يوفر هذا المعالج القدرة على تشغيل البرامج الثقيلة مثل Blender وAdobe Premiere Pro بسلاسة، ويضمن تجربة ألعاب ممتازة مع زمن وصول منخفض. شاشة 18 بوصة 4K Mini-LED مذهلة تأتي الشاشة ذات الجودة الفائقة بدقة 4K ومعدل تحديث 120 هرتز، مع شهادة DisplayHDR 1000، ومعدل سطوع يبلغ 1000 نيت، ونسبة تباين 2 ملايين إلى 1، وتغطية ألوان DCI-P3 كاملة. هذه المواصفات تجعلها الخيار الأمثل كلاعبين ومبدعين يرغبون في تباين ألوان عالي وسلاسة في العرض، فضلًا عن دعم محتوى HDR بأفضل صورة ممكنة. ذاكرة DDR5 سعة 64 جيجابايت ومساحة تخزين ضخمة يحتوي الجهاز على ذاكرة عشوائية DDR5 بسعة كبيرة 64 جيجابايت تناسب المستخدمين الأكثر تطلبًا، سواء في تعدد المهام أو تشغيل التطبيقات الثقيلة. كما يوفر قرص SSD بسعة 2 تيرابايت، مما يعطي حرية تخزين واسعة للألعاب والملفات الكبيرة دون الحاجة لإدارة مستمرة للمساحة المتاحة. إضافات متميزة ترفع من مستوى الجهاز مزود ببطارية ضخمة 99.9 وات في الساعة تمكن المستخدم من العمل أو اللعب لساعات ممتدة، مع لوحة مفاتيح RGB من SteelSeries لأداء دقيق وجذاب، واتصال Wi-Fi 7 الذي يضمن سرعات إنترنت عالية وثابتة، مما يعزز تجربة اللعب الجماعية والبث والتنزيل. في الختام، قدمنا لكم عبر محتوى بلس عرضًا...

title: Perché i trader dell'oro sono diventati improvvisamente cauti questa settimana?
content: Martedì i prezzi dell'oro sono rimasti poco variati mentre gli investitori hanno fatto una pausa dopo la recente volatilità di mercato e hanno rivolto l'attenzione agli sviluppi in Medio Oriente e ai prossimi segnali della Federal Reserve sui tassi di interesse. Il prezzo spot dell'oro è sceso dello 0,1% a $4,560.39 l'oncia alle 0228 GMT, mentre i future sull'oro statunitense con consegna a giugno sono saliti dello 0,1% a $4,563.10 l'oncia sul COMEX di New York. Il tono di mercato ha seguito la decisione del presidente statunitense Donald Trump di sospendere un attacco militare pianificato contro l'Iran, attenuando i timori immediati di una più ampia escalation regionale che potrebbe disturbare i mercati energetici e intensificare le pressioni inflazionistiche a livello globale. I mercati si stabilizzano dopo movimenti volatili Lunedì l'oro ha proseguito le perdite, raggiungendo il livello più basso da oltre un mese, per poi riprendersi e chiudere la seduta leggermente in rialzo. Il calo precedente è avvenuto in un contesto di crescenti preoccupazioni per l'inflazione che hanno scatenato una svendita nei mercati obbligazionari globali. Gli investitori sono apparsi più cauti martedì mentre i mercati cercavano di stabilizzarsi dopo le forti oscillazioni di materie prime, valute e titoli di Stato verificatesi all'inizio della settimana. «Il tema generale sui mercati oggi è che la polvere si sta posando dopo venerdì e i mercati cercano di capire dove andare dopo, guardando al rischio di eventi a metà settimana», ha detto Ilya Spivak, responsabile global macro di Tastylive, a Reuters. Ora i partecipanti al mercato sono concentrati sulla pubblicazione, mercoledì, dei verbali della riunione di aprile della Federal Reserve, che potrebbero fornire ulteriori indizi sulle prospettive di politica monetaria della banca centrale. Le tensioni in Medio Oriente restano al centro dell'attenzione Trump ha dichiarato di aver sospeso un attacco pianificato contro l'Iran per consentire negoziati volti a porre fine al conflitto tra USA e Iran, dopo che Teheran avrebbe presentato a Washington una nuova proposta di pace. Lo sviluppo ha contribuito al calo dei prezzi del petrolio, con i benchmark del greggio in discesa di oltre il 2% mentre si attenuavano i timori di interruzioni immediate dell'offerta. Prezzi petroliferi più bassi hanno contribuito ad attenuare alcune preoccupazioni per l'inflazione che avevano destabilizzato i mercati globali all'inizio della...

Warum werden Goldhändler diese Woche plötzlich vorsichtiger?
content: Die Goldpreise änderten sich am Dienstag kaum, da Anleger nach der jüngsten Marktvolatilität eine Pause einlegten und ihre Aufmerksamkeit auf Entwicklungen im Nahen Osten sowie bevorstehende Signale der Federal Reserve zu Zinssätzen richteten. Spot-Gold fiel 0.1% auf $4,560.39 je Unze (Stand 0228 GMT), während US-Gold-Futures mit Lieferung im Juni an der COMEX in New York um 0.1% auf $4,563.10 je Unze zulegten. Die Marktstimmung folgte der Entscheidung des US-Präsidenten Donald Trump, einen geplanten Militärschlag gegen Iran auszusetzen, was unmittelbare Befürchtungen einer breiteren regionalen Eskalation, die Energiemärkte stören und den globalen Inflationsdruck verstärken könnte, abschwächte. Märkte stabilisieren sich nach volatilen Ausschlägen Gold setzte die Verluste am Montag fort und erreichte sein tiefstes Niveau seit mehr als einem Monat, erholte sich dann jedoch und schloss die Sitzung leicht im Plus. Der vorherige Rückgang erfolgte vor dem Hintergrund steigender Inflationssorgen, die einen Ausverkauf an den globalen Rentenmärkten auslösten. Anleger wirkten am Dienstag vorsichtiger, da die Märkte nach starken Schwankungen bei Rohstoffen, Währungen und Staatsanleihen zu Beginn der Woche versuchten, sich zu stabilisieren. „Das allgemeine Thema an den Märkten heute ist, dass sich der Staub vom Freitag legt und die Märkte versuchen herauszufinden, wohin sie als Nächstes gehen, während sie auf Ereignisrisiken Mitte der Woche blicken“, sagte Ilya Spivak, Leiter Global Macro bei Tastylive, gegenüber Reuters. Marktteilnehmer konzentrieren sich nun auf die Veröffentlichung der Sitzungsprotokolle der Federal Reserve von April am Mittwoch, die weitere Hinweise auf den geldpolitischen Ausblick der Zentralbank geben könnten. Spannungen im Nahen Osten bleiben im Fokus Trump sagte, er habe einen geplanten Angriff auf Iran ausgesetzt, um Verhandlungen zu ermöglichen, die den US-iranischen Konflikt beenden sollen, nachdem Teheran Berichten zufolge einen neuen Friedensvorschlag an Washington übermittelt hatte. Die Entwicklung trug zu einem Rückgang der Ölpreise bei, wobei die Rohölreferenzwerte um mehr als 2% fielen, da die Befürchtungen über unmittelbare Angebotsunterbrechungen nachließen. Niedrigere Ölpreise halfen, einige Inflationssorgen zu dämpfen, die zu Wochenbeginn die globalen Märkte verunsichert hatten. Gold gilt traditionell als Absicherung gegen Inflation und geopolitische Unsicherheit, wenngleich höhere Zinsen die...

title: Hvorfor blir gullhandlere plutselig forsiktige denne uken?
content: Gullprisene var stort sett uendret tirsdag, da investorene tok en pause etter nylig markedsvolatilitet og vendte oppmerksomheten mot utviklingen i Midtøsten og kommende signaler fra Federal Reserve om renteutviklingen. Spot-pris på gull falt 0.1% til $4,560.39 an ounce per 0228 GMT, mens US gold futures for June delivery steg 0.1% til $4,563.10 an ounce på COMEX i New York. Markedstonen fulgte USAs president Donald Trumps beslutning om å utsette et planlagt militært angrep mot Iran, noe som dempet umiddelbare frykter for en bredere regional eskalering som kunne forstyrre energimarkedene og øke inflasjonspresset globalt. Markets stabilise after volatile moves Gull utvidet tapene mandag og falt til sitt laveste nivå på over en måned før det hentet seg inn og endte sesjonen svakt høyere. Det tidligere fallet kom midt i økende inflasjonsbekymringer som utløste et salg i globale obligasjonsmarkeder. Investorene virket mer forsiktige tirsdag mens markedene forsøkte å stabilisere seg etter kraftige svingninger i råvarer, valutaer og statsgjeld tidligere i uken. «Den generelle tematikken i markedene i dag er at støvet legger seg etter fredag, og markedene prøver å finne ut hvor de går videre mens de ser mot hendelsesrisiko midt i uken,» sa Ilya Spivak, leder for global makro hos Tastylive, til Reuters. Markedsdeltakere fokuserer nå på offentliggjøringen av referatet fra Federal Reserves aprilmøte onsdag, som kan gi ytterligere ledetråder om sentralbankens pengepolitiske utsikter. Middle East tensions remain in focus Trump sa at han hadde satt et planlagt angrep mot Iran på pause for å åpne for forhandlinger som tar sikte på å avslutte konflikten mellom USA og Iran, etter at Teheran angivelig skal ha sendt et nytt fredsforslag til Washington. Utviklingen bidro til et fall i oljeprisene, hvor råoljemarkører falt mer enn 2% ettersom bekymringene for umiddelbare leveranseforstyrrelser avtok. Lavere oljepriser bidro til å dempe noen av inflasjonsbekymringene som hadde uroet de globale markedene ved ukens start. Gull blir tradisjonelt sett på som en sikring mot inflasjon og geopolitisk usikkerhet, selv om høyere renter vanligvis reduserer attraktiviteten til metallet som ikke gir avkastning. Fed outlook and leadership changes watched Investorene forventes å grundig analysere Fed-referatet for indikasjoner på tidspunkt og retning for fremtidige rentevedtak, særlig ettersom beslutningstakere fortsatt navigerer i vedvarende inflasjonspress....

Mengapa pedagang emas tiba-tiba lebih berhati-hati minggu ini?
content: Harga emas hampir tidak berubah pada hari Selasa apabila pelabur berehat selepas turun naik pasaran baru-baru ini dan menumpukan perhatian kepada perkembangan di Timur Tengah serta isyarat akan datang daripada Rizab Persekutuan mengenai kadar faedah. Spot emas turun 0.1% kepada $4,560.39 setiap auns pada 0228 GMT, manakala kontrak niaga hadapan emas AS untuk penghantaran Jun naik 0.1% kepada $4,563.10 setiap auns di COMEX di New York. Nada pasaran mengikuti keputusan Presiden AS Donald Trump untuk menangguhkan serangan ketenteraan yang dirancang ke atas Iran, meredakan kebimbangan segera tentang eskalasi serantau yang lebih meluas yang boleh menggugat pasaran tenaga dan menguatkan tekanan inflasi global. Pasaran stabil selepas pergerakan yang tidak menentu Emas melanjutkan kerugian pada hari Isnin untuk mencapai paras terendah lebih sebulan sebelum pulih untuk menamatkan sesi sedikit lebih tinggi. Kejatuhan awal berlaku di tengah kebimbangan inflasi yang meningkat yang mencetuskan jualan besar di pasaran bon global. Pelabur nampaknya lebih berhati-hati pada hari Selasa apabila pasaran cuba menstabilkan selepas ayunan tajam dalam komoditi, mata wang dan hutang kerajaan pada awal minggu ini. “Tema umum pasaran hari ini ialah debu sedang mendap dari hari Jumaat dan pasaran cuba menentukan ke mana mereka akan bergerak seterusnya sambil memerhatikan risiko peristiwa pertengahan minggu,” kata Ilya Spivak, ketua makro global di Tastylive, kepada Reuters. Peserta pasaran kini tertumpu kepada penerbitan minit mesyuarat April Rizab Persekutuan pada hari Rabu, yang boleh memberikan petunjuk lanjut terhadap prospek dasar bank pusat. Ketegangan Timur Tengah kekal menjadi tumpuan Trump berkata beliau telah menangguhkan serangan yang dirancang ke atas Iran untuk memberi laluan kepada rundingan yang bertujuan menamatkan konflik AS-Iran, selepas Tehran dilaporkan mengemukakan cadangan damai baharu kepada Washington. Perkembangan itu menyumbang kepada penurunan harga minyak, dengan penanda aras minyak mentah jatuh lebih 2% apabila kebimbangan tentang gangguan bekalan segera mereda. Harga minyak yang lebih rendah membantu meredakan sebahagian kebimbangan inflasi yang menggegarkan pasaran global pada awal minggu. Emas secara tradisi dianggap sebagai lindung nilai terhadap inflasi dan ketidakpastian geopolitik, walaupun kadar faedah yang lebih tinggi umumnya mengurangkan daya tarikan logam yang tidak memberikan hasil itu. Unjuran Rizab Persekutuan dan perubahan kepimpinan...

title: Miksi kullan kauppiaat ovat tällä viikolla yhtäkkiä varovaisia?
content: Kullan hinnat muuttuivat tiistaina vain vähän, kun sijoittajat vetäytyivät äskettäisen markkinavaihtelun jälkeen ja suuntasivat huomionsa Lähi-idän kehitykseen sekä Fedin odotettavissa oleviin korkoviesteihin. Spot-kulta laski 0.1% $4,560.39 unssilta kohdalla 0228 GMT, kun taas Yhdysvaltain kesäkuun kultafutuurit nousivat 0.1% $4,563.10 unssilta COMEXissa New Yorkissa. Markkinasävy seurasi Yhdysvaltain presidentin Donald Trumpin päätöstä keskeyttää suunniteltu sotilaallinen isku Iraniin, mikä lievensi välittömiä pelkoja laajemmasta alueellisesta eskalaatiosta, joka voisi häiritä energiamarkkinoita ja lisätä inflaatiopaineita maailmanlaajuisesti. Markkinat vakautuvat voimakkaiden heiluntojen jälkeen Kulta jatkoi tappioitaan maanantaina ja osui yli kuukauden pohjalle ennen toipumista ja session kevyttä nousua. Aiempi lasku tapahtui kasvaneiden inflaatiohuolien keskellä, jotka laukaisivat myyntiaallon globaaleilla velkamarkkinoilla. Sijoittajat vaikuttivat tiistaina varovaisemmilta, kun markkinat yrittivät tasaantua hyödyke-, valuutta- ja valtionvelkamarkkinoilla viikon aiempien jyrkkien heilahtelujen jälkeen. ”Yleinen teema markkinoilla tänään on, että pöly laskeutuu perjantain tapahtumista ja markkinat yrittävät selvittää, mihin suuntaan ne menevät seuraavaksi, kun ne katsovat keskiviikon tapahtumariskejä,” Ilya Spivak, Tastyliven globaalin makron johtaja, kertoi Reutersille. Markkinaosapuolet keskittyvät nyt Federal Reserven huhtikuun kokouksen pöytäkirjojen julkaisuun keskiviikkona, mikä voisi antaa lisävihjeitä keskuspankin politiikanäkymistä. Lähi-idän jännitteet pysyvät keskiössä Trump sanoi keskeyttäneensä suunnitellun iskun Iraniin antaakseen tilaa neuvotteluille, jotka tähtäävät Yhdysvaltojen ja Iranin välisen konfliktin päättämiseen, sen jälkeen kun Teheran oli raporttien mukaan toimittanut Washingtonille uuden rauhanesityksen. Tapahtuma myötävaikutti öljyn hintojen laskuun, kun raaka-ainesvertailut putosivat yli 2% välittömien toimitushäiriöiden pelkojen laantuessa. Alhaisemmat öljyn hinnat auttoivat laimentamaan joitain inflaatiohuolia, jotka olivat järkyttäneet globaaleja markkinoita viikon alussa. Kultaa pidetään perinteisesti suojana inflaatiota ja geopoliittista epävarmuutta vastaan, vaikka korkeammat korot yleensä heikentävät tuottamattoman metallin houkuttelevuutta. Fedin näkymät ja johtajuusmuutokset seurannassa Sijoittajat odotetaan analysoivan tarkasti...

title: Hyderabad City Police launched SOCEYE
Por que os traders de ouro ficaram repentinamente cautelosos esta semana?
content: Os preços do ouro pouco variaram na terça-feira, enquanto investidores fizeram uma pausa após a recente volatilidade do mercado e voltaram sua atenção para os desdobramentos no Oriente Médio e para os próximos sinais do Federal Reserve sobre as taxas de juros. O ouro à vista caiu 0.1% para $4,560.39 por onça às 0228 GMT, enquanto os contratos futuros de ouro dos EUA para entrega em junho subiram 0.1% para $4,563.10 por onça no COMEX, em Nova York. O tom do mercado seguiu a decisão do presidente dos EUA, Donald Trump, de suspender um ataque militar planejado ao Irã, aliviando temores imediatos de uma escalada regional mais ampla que poderia interromper os mercados de energia e intensificar as pressões inflacionárias globalmente. Mercados se estabilizam após movimentos voláteis O ouro ampliou perdas na segunda-feira, alcançando seu nível mais baixo em mais de um mês antes de se recuperar e encerrar a sessão ligeiramente em alta. A queda anterior ocorreu em meio a preocupações crescentes com a inflação, que desencadearam uma venda generalizada nos mercados globais de títulos. Os investidores aparentaram maior cautela na terça-feira, enquanto os mercados tentavam se estabilizar após fortes oscilações em commodities, moedas e dívidas soberanas no início da semana. “O tema geral nos mercados hoje é que a poeira está baixando desde sexta-feira e os mercados estão tentando descobrir para onde seguir, enquanto observam o risco de eventos no meio da semana”, disse Ilya Spivak, chefe de macro global da Tastylive, à Reuters. Os participantes do mercado agora estão focados na divulgação das atas da reunião de abril do Federal Reserve, na quarta-feira, que pode fornecer mais pistas sobre a perspectiva de política do banco central. As tensões no Oriente Médio continuam em foco Trump disse que havia suspenso um ataque planejado ao Irã para permitir negociações destinadas a encerrar o conflito EUA-Irã, após Teerã supostamente ter apresentado uma nova proposta de paz a Washington. O episódio contribuiu para a queda nos preços do petróleo, com os principais benchmarks do petróleo recuando mais de 2% à medida que as preocupações com interrupções imediatas de oferta diminuíram. Preços mais baixos do petróleo ajudaram a aliviar algumas preocupações com a inflação que haviam perturbado os mercados globais no início da semana. O ouro é tradicionalmente visto como uma proteção contra a inflação e a incerteza...

title: 고유가 피해 지원금 접수처 찾은 윤호중 장관
Siam Piwat joins Bangkok Pride to launch Right to Love 2026
content: BANGKOK, THAILAND - Media OutReach Newswire - 18 May 2026 - Siam Piwat Group, a leading real estate and retail developer—owner and operator of global destinations including Siam Paragon, Siam Center, and Siam Discovery, and a joint-venture partner of ICONSIAM and Siam Premium Outlets Bangkok —has partnered with Bangkok Pride, the Tourism Authority of Thailand, the Bangkok Metropolitan Administration, UNDP, and Drag Bangkok. They have launched the campaign \"The Celebration: Right to Love 2026\" to reinforce their commitment to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DE&I). The initiative aims to position Bangkok as a premier Global Pride Destination and support Thailand\'s bid to host World Pride 2030. Thanaporn Tantiyanon, Managing Director and Shopping Center Business Head of Siam Paragon, Siam Center, and Siam Discovery for Siam Piwat Group, stated that this campaign harnesses diversity to drive Thailand\'s economy and Soft Power. Each shopping center features unique highlights: Siam Paragon honored by Naruemit Pride who host the \"Bangkok Pride Awards\" on May 28, 2026, at NEX HALL (5th Floor). The \"Bangkok Pride Forum 2026\" will also take place from May 29 to June 1, 2026, at SCBX Next Tech (4th Floor) and NEXTOPIA (5th Floor), featuring an international platform with over 16 sessions focused on LGBTQ+ and women\'s rights. Siam Paragon will join the Bangkok Pride Parade on May 31, 2026, under the theme \"Road to Bangkok World Pride\". Furthermore, Siam Paragon is driving the Y-Economy (Boys\' Love industry) through the \"TIA51 x Siam Paragon\" project, featuring the launch of the series \"Love x3\" and the \"Love Galaxy\" project. Siam Center, known as The Ideaopolis, promotes inclusivity through the \"The Colors of Thai Beauty\" campaign, inviting everyone to express their beauty without limits and elevating T-Beauty standards from June 4 – 30, 2026. Siam Center also features vibrant performances from Drag Bangkok, T-POP shows, and mini-concerts throughout the festival, held on the G Floor from May 28 to June 3, 2026. In a massive display of Co-creation, Siam Center has collaborated with over 40 renowned brands—including Adidas, Jaspal Group, Victoria\'s Secret, and Absolute Siam Store—to launch exclusive Pride collections and lifestyle products designed by talented Thai designers. title: ONF to drop second part of its new full-length album on June 17
Yeni fay hattı bölgeyi ikiye yaracak: Fermuar gibi açılacak
ઉજ્જૈની એક્સપ્રેસ ટ્રેનના ત્રણ ડબ્બા પાટા પરથી ઉતર્યા
Indian markets resilient despite global shocks, says Sebi chief
content: Mumbai: Volatility has shot up in the financial markets due to the ongoing West Asia conflict, but the Indian bourses have the capacity to "absorb different types of shocks", Sebi Chairman Tuhin Kanta Pandey said on Monday. When there is a crisis in one part of the world, it also impacts the rest of the globe, Pandey told reporters here on the sideline of the Regional Investors Seminar for Awareness. "Due to the prevailing conflict in West Asia, the oil supply chain and its prices got affected in the rest of the world. All the economies have been affected by this and obviously, there are inflationary risks. Besides, spillover effect and second-order effect will also come in," he said. "However, the advantages of a resilient Indian market are that it is able to absorb different types of shocks, and when these end, the market again resumes its normal trajectory," Pandey said. He also admitted that there have been some foreign portfolio investment outflows since September 2024, but domestic investors have "retained their confidence". Asked how SEBI is addressing threats from AI tools, Pandey said, "Most of the recent concerns around such tools are related to cybersecurity. As you know, markets rely heavily on software systems, and if cybersecurity is threatened or vulnerabilities are found in the software, there is a risk of attacks. If such attacks are successful, they can pose a serious threat to market integrity." "Therefore, we have to proactively ensure that all the software we deploy, including those provided by third-party vendors, is well protected. There has to be aggressive patch management and extensive use of conventional tools to identify vulnerabilities," the Sebi chief said. Sebi is using mechanism to ensure that the market, market ecosystem, and intermediaries are protected from any cyber risk, he asserted.

title: 고유가 피해 지원금 사용가능 매장 스티커 부착하는 윤호중 장관
Indian cricketer Shreyanka Patil dances to RCB’s beat!
content: India women’s cricketer Shreyanka Patil , 23, showed off her dance moves as she celebrated Royal Challengers Bengaluru’s qualification for the Playoffs of the Indian Premier League after their 23-run win over Punjab Kings in Dharamsala on Sunday. View this post on Instagram A post shared by Shreyanka Patil (@shreyanka_patil31) The off-spinner, who also plays for RCB in the Women’s Premier League, shared a video to her 4.9 million followers on Instagram, captioning it, “The Q Dance,” in reference to RCB’s qualification. The post received over 4.25 lakh ‘likes’.

title: Leopard found dead in Tamil Nadu forest
content: An adult leopard was found dead near Mayfield Estate within the Gudalur forest division on Monday. The forest officials recovered the carcass of the leopard, and as per the National Tiger Conservation Authority (NTCA) guidelines the Gudalur forest division veterinarians will be conducting a postmortem examination. The forest department officials said the exact reason for the death of the animal will be ascertained only after the lab reports were released.

title: IPL 2026: `It was class bowling in last six overs` DC skipper Axar
content: Delhi Capitals skipper Axar Patel lauded his bowlers, particularly "youngster" Mitchell Starc, for helping the team fight back in the last six overs and score an important five-wicket win over Rajasthan Royals in their IPL match here on Sunday. The win swelled DC`s tally to 12 points from 13 matches with a game in hand, but it also gave them an outside chance to enter the playoffs if they win their final fixture next Sunday, provided some other results go their way. "We bowled really well in the middle overs to make a comeback. The last six overs, it was class bowling. The bowling unit refused to give up. Our `youngster` (Starc) did that for us today," Axar said in the post-match presentation here on Sunday. Axar also said the opening stand of 105 between KL Rahul (56) and Abhishek Porel (51) eased pressure on the middle-order batters. "It`s obviously special to win at home. One thing has improved that we used to lose wickets in clusters easily, but today we got a good opening stand which helped the other batters." Player of the match Starc said the DC bowling unit fought back well. "We didn`t bowl too badly in the powerplay but they batted well. But we brought things back later and KL batted fantastically, and to finish at home with a win is always nice. Adjusting as quickly as you can is key because boundaries aren`t too big here," said the pacer. Rajasthan captain Riyan Parag said his side did not capitalise on a very good platform after the 14th over. The RR had scored over 150 runs at that stage. "We were in a pretty good space after 14 overs. Once I got out we didn`t capitalise and should have got around 210. Our bowling, we weren`t up to the mark." Parag was candid enough to concede that it`s RR`s own fault to find themselves in a tight space in the road to IPL playoffs. "If you want to win a trophy, you have to compete in every game. We`re a way better team than we showed in the last 4-5 games. Coming from a break, skillwise, energywise, executionwise we weren`t there and if we play like this, we shouldn`t be in the top four. "We had the opportunity, we didn`t take it. If we don`t qualify, it`s our fault, nobody else`s," he added. DC batter Rahul was delighted after going past the 500-run mark in IPL 2026, but said he was yet to fully decode the format. "This one feels a little more special because I`ve scored 500 runs in previous seasons too, but this year I set out to achieve something else, which was to improve my strike-rate and keep up with...

title: IPL 2026: Match-winning pacers dominate the tournament
content: Bhuvneshwar Kumar (RCB) Matches: 13, Wickets: 24, Best: 4-23 Bhuvneshwar Kumar is rolling back the years with a tournament to remember and currently leads the race for the Purple Cap with 24 wickets. This season has brought out the absolute best in the right-arm medium pacer, who has anchored his team’s bowling unit, claiming three or more wickets on six occasions in 13 matches. His 3-5 helped Royal Challengers Bengaluru register their biggest victory in terms of balls remaining (81) after rattling Delhi Capitals for just 75 all out, while the 36-year-old’s 3-27 and season’s best 4-23 played major roles in RCB’s victories after restricting Lucknow Super Giants and Mumbai Indians to 146 all out and 166-7 respectively. Kagiso Rabada (GT) Matches: 13, Wickets: 21, Best: 3-25 Gujarat Titans’s Kagiso Rabada has been the most destructive pacer in the Powerplay this season, putting opponents on the back foot early in the innings. So far, the right-arm pacer has claimed 16 wickets in the first six overs alone — the second-most in the Powerplay in a single IPL edition. Rabada has often single-handedly helped GT win matches by restricting opponents to under 200 in a season that has seen the most 200-plus totals (53). His 3-29 kept Kolkata Knight Riders to just 180 all out, while his season’s best 3-25 helped Chennai Super Kings manage only 158-7. Rabada’s Player-of-the-Match effort also helped GT defend 168-5 as Sunrisers Hyderabad’s big-hitting top-order surrendered to the 30-year-old’s pace, tumbling for just 86 all out in 14.5 overs. Jofra Archer (RR) Matches: 12, Wickets: 17, Best: 3-20 Jofra Archer has spearheaded Rajasthan Royals’s pace attack this season after claiming just 12 wickets last year. The right-armer was instrumental in his team’s easy win over RCB, dismissing opener Phil Salt for a duck off the first ball and then accounting for the wicket of Devdutt Padikkal in his next over. Archer’s biggest success this season came during his match-winning spell against LSG, where his 3-20 helped restrict them to just 119 in a chase of RR’s 159-6. In this process, Archer, who has claimed 74 wickets playing for RR, went past Shane Watson (67 wkts) to become the franchise’s all-time leading wicket-taker.

title: IPL 2026: Rajasthan Royals can’t let the playoff spot slip
content: Their Playoff hopes hanging by a thread, the Rajasthan Royals will need an all-round improvement against the out-of-contention Lucknow Super Giants to stay alive in the IPL here on Tuesday. At the high-scoring Sawai Mansingh Stadium, RR are yet to win a game this season and the final fixture here is a do-or-die one for the home team. Following Tuesday’s fixture, RR’s last game is also against a vanquished outfit — Mumbai Indians. In Delhi on Sunday night, RR should have out-batted Delhi Capitals but a lower-order collapse cost them the match in which their fielding and bowling were also fairly ordinary. This was their third defeat in a row. RR have been relying heavily on 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi for flying starts, but the youngster has not got enough support from Yashasvi Jaiswal at the other end. Dhruv Jurel has played some sublime knocks, but the one on Sunday night was a rather subdued one with wickets falling at the other end. Captain Riyan Parag was underwhelming in the first half of the IPL, but has picked up pace in recent games. He would want his side to be much more clinical in the last five overs with the bat. The catching and fielding have generally been poor in the IPL and RR too have been guilty of grassing easy chances. Meanwhile, Rishabh Pant-led LSG, dealing with issues of their own, come into the game on the back of a rare win in the tournament. They beat Chennai Super Kings at home on May 15 and would be looking to play party-poopers in their remaining two games (last one against Punjab Kings). title: Selection for Afghan series: Bumrah’s workload, Rohit’s fitness in focus
content: Pace spearhead Jasprit Bumrah `s workload management will be debated alongside the match fitness of Rohit Sharma when the national selectors pick India`s squads for next month`s one-off Test and three ODIs against Afghanistan, here on Tuesday. There is a short turnaround between the IPL and the one off Test which begins in Mullanpur (New Chandigarh) from June 6. The IPL final is scheduled on May 31 in Ahmedabad. The ODI games will take place in Dharamsala, Lucknow and Chennai on June 14, 17 and 20. It is unlikely that Bumrah would be picked for both formats because there is no immediate rush for him to feature in ODIs. The 50-over World Cup is still a long way off (October-November, 2027). Rohit had missed a chunk of Mumbai Indians` matches earlier in the IPL due to a hamstring injury and in the last game against Punjab Kings, he only came out to bat as an impact player. The selectors will include him in the side only if he is fully fit for 100 overs of an ODI game. Superstar Virat Kohli , who like Rohit is now a one format player, has shown sublime form in the IPL and is expected to feature in all three ODIs against Afghanistan. The one-off Test holds more significance considering India`s troubles in the traditional format especially at home. The batters need to find a way to tackle spin-friendly conditions. It is an aspect that has bothered them for a while now and was thoroughly exposed by South Africa in the home series last November. India have also not been able to find a stable number three since Cheteshwar Pujara left the scene. Sai Sudharsan got his chances but could not deliver. And now Devdutt Padikkal is expected to be given a decent run from the start of the home season. Architect of Jammu and Kashmir`s historic Ranji Trophy triumph, Aquib Nabi, is also likely to be a part of selectors` discussion for the Test team. He took 60 wickets in a stellar campaign. Prince Yadav for ODIs? Prince Yadav, who has impressed with his pace and accuracy in the ongoing IPL, can be tried in the ODI series. If Bumrah is not part of the side, Mohammed Siraj will be the leader of the attack with Prasidh Krishna too likely to feature in it. Like Rohit, Hardik Pandya too has been battling to stay fit in the IPL following back spasms. It remains to be seen if he is available for the ODIs. title: Ex-England Test captain MJK Smith dies aged 92
content: Former England Test captain Mike Smith has died at the age of 92, his former county side Warwickshire announced on Monday. The bespectacled batter, known by his initials MJK, played 50 Tests for England, captaining on 25 occasions, and was also a rugby union international, earning one cap against Wales in 1956. He made his Test debut against New Zealand in 1958 and played his final Test against Australia in 1972. This story has been sourced from a third party syndicated feed, agencies. title: Indian-origin golfer Aaron Rai bags maiden PGA C’ship title
content: Aaron Rai produced the defining moment of his career at the 2026 PGA Championship, sealing his maiden major crown with a sensational late flourish at Aronimink Golf Club. The Englishman entered the closing stretch of Sunday’s final round with a narrow advantage, but it was his remarkable birdie putt on the par-3 17th that effectively settled the tournament. Facing a daunting 68-foot attempt with the pressure of a major title hanging over him, Rai rolled the putt in to spark huge celebrations from the galleries and move three shots clear of the chasing pack. That moment gave the Wolverhampton-born golfer enough breathing room heading to the 18th, where a composed par finish secured both the championship and the iconic Wanamaker Trophy. In doing so, Rai became the first English winner of the PGA Championship since Jim Barnes lifted the title more than a century ago in 1919. Rai closed the week at nine-under-par, finishing three strokes ahead of a group tied for second place. Alex Smalley, who had held the overnight clubhouse lead after the third round, carded an even-par final round to end at six under alongside Jon Rahm, who posted a two-under 68 on Sunday. Matti Schmid, who began the final day as Rai’s closest challenger, slipped back after the decisive stretch and eventually shared third place at five under with Ludvig Åberg and Justin Thomas. For Rai, whose 2026 campaign had largely been filled with inconsistency and missed opportunities, the victory marked a dramatic turnaround on one of golf’s biggest stages. “It’s very surreal. It’s been a frustrating season, so to be stood here is outside of my wildest imagination,” Rai said after the win. The 31-year-old also reflected on the deeper lessons the sport has taught him throughout his journey to major success. “Golf is an amazing game. It teaches you so many things, and it teaches you so much humility, discipline and absolute hard work, because nothing is ever given in this game. No matter what level you’re playing, no matter what course you’re playing on. It just teaches so many amazing life skills. Pretty much every guy on tour... are incredible people. The sport should be very proud of the ambassadors that represent the PGA Tour and the PGA of America,” he added. Rai’s triumph at Aronimink now places him among golf’s newest major champions and caps one of the most memorable final-round performances of the season. This story has been sourced from a third party syndicated feed, agencies. Mid-day...

title: Tennis ace Leander’s mum Olympian Jennifer Paes no more
content: Former India basketball captain and Olympian Jennifer Paes, mother of tennis legend Leander Paes, passed away on Sunday after a prolonged battle with cancer. She was 72. "She was terminally ill cancer patient and passed away on Sunday. The funeral service was held today at St Thomas Church in Kolkata," a family source said. Born Jennifer Dutton, she was the great-great-granddaughter of noted Bengali poet and dramatist Michael Madhusudan Dutt. Jennifer represented India in basketball at the 1972 Munich Olympics and later captained the national team, emerging as one of the prominent figures in Indian women`s basketball. She belonged to one of India`s most distinguished sporting families. Her husband, Dr. Vece Paes, was a member of the Indian hockey team that won bronze at the 1972 Munich Olympics. Dr. Paes died in August 2025. Leander grew into one of India`s most celebrated tennis players and clinched a bronze medal in men`s singles at the 1996 Atlanta Olympics. He won 18 Grand Slam titles. “แมน นครปฐม” คว้าตั๋วอาชีพสนุกเกอร์คืนเวทีโลก
content: “แมน นครปฐม” คืนเวทีโลก ไล่ทุบจีน 4-1 คว้าตั๋วอาชีพสนุกเกอร์ในรอบ 10 ปี “แมน นครปฐม” ธนวัฒน์ ถิรพงศ์ไพบูลย์ โชว์ฟอร์มสุดเฉียบคมในการแข่งขันสนุกเกอร์คิวสกูล เอเชีย-โอเชียเนีย 2026 รายการแรก ที่ถนนสุคนธสวัสดิ์ กรุงเทพมหานคร เมื่อวันที่ 18 พฤษภาคมที่ผ่านมา ซึ่งเดินทางมาถึงรอบรองชนะเลิศอันเป็นรอบชี้ชะตา ได้รับเกียรติจาก นายวรศิษฏ์ เลียงประสิทธิ์ รัฐมนตรีช่วยว่าการกระทรวงมหาดไทย และ นายสุนทร จารุมนต์ นายกสมาคมกีฬาบิลเลียดแห่งประเทศไทย เป็นประธาน โดย “แมน นครปฐม” เป็นนักสนุกเกอร์ไทย เพียงหนึ่งเดียว ที่ผ่านเข้ามาถึงรอบรองชนะเลิศ หากชนะนัดนี้ จะการันตีได้ตั๋วไปแข่งขันสนุกเกอร์อาชีพที่ประเทศอังกฤษ เป็นเวลา 2 ฤดูกาล อีกด้วย ในรอบก่อนรองชนะเลิศ “แมน นครปฐม” อดีตแชมป์สนุกเกอร์เยาวชนโลก ปี 2011 พบกับ ไป๋ หลาง หนิง อดีตนักสอยคิวจากจีน ที่เคยไปเล่นอาชีพมาแล้วเช่นเดียวกัน โดยแข่งขันกันในระบบ 4 ใน 7 เฟรม ซึ่งตลอดการแข่งขันตั้งแต่รอบ 64 คน “แมน นครปฐม” ทําผลงานได้ดีมาโดยตลอด ชนะคู่แข่งทั้ง 4 คน แบบขาดลอย และในรอบรองชนะเลิศ ครั้งนี้ก็เช่นเดียวกัน “แมน นครปฐม” ยังคงโชว์ความแม่นที่แน่นอน และ ออกคิวได้อย่างเฉียบขาดกว่าอย่างชัดเจน ทําให้สามารถไล่ต้อนเอาชนะ ไป๋ หลาง หนิง ไปได้อย่างขาดลอยอีกเช่นเคย ด้วยสกอร์ 4-1 เฟรม ( 95-14, 75-16, 6-73, 88-35 และ 96-35 ) ชัยชนะนัดนี้ส่งผลให้ ธนวัฒน์ ถิรพงศ์ไพบูลย์ หรือ “แมน นครปฐม” คว้าการ์ดทัวร์สนุกเกอร์อาชีพโลกอย่างเป็นทางการ ในฤดูกาล 2026/27 และ 2027/28 ได้สําเร็จ พร้อมเป็นการกลับคืนสู่สังเวียนอาชีพโลกอีกครั้งในรอบ 10 ปี หลังจากที่เคยหลุดทัวร์ไปตั้งแต่ปี 2016 นอกจากนี้ แมน นครปฐม ยังสร้างสถิติเป็นนักสนุกเกอร์ไทยรายที่ 6 ที่สามารถคว้าตั๋วอาชีพโลกผ่านเวทีคิวสกูลสําเร็จ เริ่มต้นปีแรกจาก “แจ๊ค สระบุรี” เดชาวัต พุ่มแจ้ง และ “แมน นครปฐม” ( ได้ตั๋วคู่กันในปี 2022) / “ควิด คิวเฮาส์” มนัสวินษ์ เพชรมาลัยกุล ( ปี 2023) / “ซันนี่ อาร์แบค” อรรคนิธิ์ ส่งเสริมสวัสดิ์ ( ปี 2024) และ “ติม กาญจน์” ชัชพงศ์ นาสา ( ปี 2025) รวมถึงปีนี้ (2026 ) “ แมน นครปฐม” ธนวัฒน์ ถิรพงศ์ไพบูลย์ กลับมาสร้างผลงานได้สิทธิ์อีกครั้ง นับเป็นอีกหนึ่งข่าวดีของวงการสอยคิวไทยที่มีนักกีฬาไปโลดแล่นในระดับโลกอย่างต่อเนื่อง นายวรศิษฏ์ เลียงประสิทธิ์ รัฐมนตรีช่วยว่าการกระทรวงมหาดไทย ได้แสดงความยินดีกับ “แมน นครปฐม” พร้อมทั้งกล่าวด้วยว่า “ผมชอบกีฬาสนุกเกอร์ ถึงแม้จะเล่นไม่เก่ง แต่ก็ติดตามมาโดยตลอด เป็นกีฬาที่ใช้สมองในการวางแผน ไม่ใช่ใช้ความสามารถเพียงอย่างเดียว ส่วนตัวยินดีสนับสนุนให้น้อง ๆ นักกีฬาทุกคนมีโอกาสเติบโตในอนาคตต่อไป ขณะที่ นายสุนทร จารุมนต์ นายกสมาคมกีฬาบิลเลียดแห่งประเทศไทย ได้กล่าวความรู้สึกเช่นเดียวกันว่า ดีใจกับนักกีฬาไทยที่ประสบความสําเร็จ ได้วันนี้เป็นคนที้ 6 และอีก 2 วันจะทําการแข่งขันรายการที่ 2 น่าจะมีนักสนุกเกอร์ไทยเพิ่มอีก 1 คน ปิดท้ายที่ “แมน นครปฐม” ธนวัฒน์...

title: 고유가 피해 지원금 지급 현장 상황 점검하는 윤호중 장관
Airlink launches direct Cape Town-Zanzibar flights
content: Staff Writer Airlink will launch the first non-stop route between Cape Town and Zanzibar in October 2026 using its new Embraer E195-E2 aircraft. Bookings for the route are now open. The weekly service will connect Cape Town directly to the Indian Ocean island, which is known for its beaches, resorts, marine life, spice trade history and the UNESCO-listed Stone Town. The new route will become Airlink’s second service to Zanzibar following the launch of its Johannesburg-Zanzibar flights scheduled to begin on 03 June 2026. Airlink said it will operate the route using its new Embraer E195-E2 aircraft, which accommodates 124 passengers in a two-class cabin configuration. The aircraft only has window and aisle seats, with no middle seats. “The introduction of our new flagship aircraft, the E195-E2, with its innovative business class and comfortable economy seats, enables Airlink to bring destinations such as Zanzibar within convenient, non-stop reach of Cape Town, which is an important source market for travel to the island. Cape Town is also our second hub and a popular connecting point for long-haul, regional and local customers travelling with Airlink or any of our partner airlines from around the world,” said Airlink chief executive officer De Villiers Engelbrecht. The flights will begin on 03 October 2026 and operate every Saturday. Flight time is expected to be just over six hours. Airlink said the flight schedule avoids middle-of-the-night and pre-dawn departures and arrivals. The airline said Zanzibar continues to grow in popularity among tourists and business travellers. Besides tourism, the island’s economy is also supported by agriculture, manufacturing, marine services and offshore oil and gas exploration. Airlink added that Zanzibar’s online electronic visa application system and visa-on-arrival option have also contributed to growing travel demand for the destination.

title: Maharashtra govt clears Rs 993 crore projects for pilgrimage, heritage tourism
content: The Maharashtra government has approved development and conservation projects worth Rs 993.72 crore for pilgrimage centres, forts and historical sites across the state. The decision was taken by an apex committee chaired by Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis on Monday. The projects focus on preservation of heritage structures, tourism infrastructure development and improved facilities for pilgrims and visitors. The approvals come even as the state government continues to stress financial prudence amid global economic uncertainties linked to the West Asia situation. Major allocations announced for six heritage and pilgrimage projects According to an official government release, the approved projects include Rs 172 crore for the Shri Kshetra Bhimashankar Adarsh Gaon Development project and Rs 41 crore for conservation works at the birthplace of Sant Tukaram Maharaj . The government has also sanctioned Rs 134.80 crore for preservation and beautification of Ajinkyatara Fort and Rs 133 crore for the Sangam Mahuli Samadhi conservation project in Satara district. In addition, Rs 210 crore has been approved for the development of the Grishneshwar Jyotirlinga Temple near Ellora, while Rs 301.54 crore has been allocated for development works at the Parli Vaijnath Jyotirlinga Temple. Bhimashankar project to include roads, ropeway and tourism facilities Under the Bhimashankar development plan, authorities will construct a modern bus station, parking facilities and upgraded road infrastructure aimed at easing traffic congestion in the temple area. Officials said narrow roads measuring 2.7 metres will be widened to seven metres. The project also includes pedestrian pathways, covered corridors, temple flooring works and an amphitheatre within the temple premises. Additional infrastructure planned for the area includes a sewage treatment plant, a new police station, rest house facilities and a proposed substation near the Dimbhe Dam region. The government also plans to introduce a cable car facility and upgrade tourism infrastructure, including development of the MTDC Bhimashankar Resort and tourism amenities at Rajapur. The project is expected to be completed by May 2027. Conservation work planned at Dehu and Ajinkyatara Fort At Dehu, the birthplace of Sant Tukaram Maharaj, the state government will undertake conservation and beautification works at Bhandara Dongar and nearby religious sites. The project includes improved sanitation systems, drinking water...

title: US approves USD 428 million military support packages for India
content: The United States of America has approved two separate Foreign Military Sales packages for India worth a combined USD 428.2 million, aimed at supporting the maintenance and operational readiness of AH-64E Apache helicopters and M777A2 ultra-light howitzers. The approvals were announced by the US State Department’s Bureau of Political-Military Affairs through congressional notifications issued on May 18. The proposed deals are part of the growing defence partnership between India and the United States, which has expanded steadily over the past decade. Major support package cleared for M777 howitzers The larger of the two proposals involves long-term sustainment support for India’s fleet of M777A2 ultra-light howitzers, valued at an estimated USD 230 million. According to the State Department, India requested continued logistical and maintenance support for the artillery systems, including spare parts, repair services, technical assistance and field support. “The US Department of State has made a determination approving a possible Foreign Military Sale to the Government of India sustainment support for M777A2 Ultra-Light Howitzers ,” the notification stated. The package also includes training support, depot maintenance capability, field service representatives and other related programme assistance required to maintain operational readiness of the howitzers. The principal contractor for the deal will be BAE Systems, which manufactures the M777 artillery system. The M777 howitzers, known for their lightweight design and mobility in difficult terrain, are currently used by the Indian Army in high-altitude border areas and other operational deployments. Apache helicopter support package valued at USD 198.2 million In a separate notification, the US approved a USD 198.2 million package linked to India’s AH-64E Apache attack helicopters . The proposed agreement includes sustainment support services, engineering and technical assistance, logistics support, technical publications and personnel training for the helicopter fleet. “The US Department of State has made a determination approving a possible Foreign Military Sale to the Government of India for its purchase of Apache Helicopters follow-on support services and related equipment,” the State Department said. The principal contractors for the Apache-related support package are Boeing and Lockheed Martin. India has inducted Apache helicopters into the Indian Air Force and Army Aviation Corps as part of efforts...

Así es la casa de Roberto Leal en Madrid: un chalet en Las Rozas valorado en casi 2 millones de euros
content: La casa de Roberto Leal y su mujer, la periodista Sara Rubio , en Madrid es una de las residencias más llamativas entre los hogares de los presentadores de televisión españoles: un chalet amplio y luminoso valorado en alrededor de 1,9 millones de euros , situado en una de las zonas más exclusivas de Las Rozas , al norte de la capital. Con más de 900 metros cuadrados construidos sobre una parcela de casi 2.600 m2 , cinco dormitorios, seis baños, jardín, piscina y garaje, esta vivienda combina espacio y comodidad y refleja las prioridades de una familia con ritmo de vida activo y necesidades prácticas. Así es la casa de Roberto Leal en Madrid La casa de Roberto Leal y Sara Rubio en Madrid responde a un patrón cada vez más buscado entre los rostros conocidos: amplitud, funcionalidad, luz natural y espacios exteriores bien aprovechados. Lejos de excesos decorativos o decisiones llamativas, la vivienda destaca por su equilibrio entre diseño contemporáneo y comodidad, con una distribución pensada para una familia con niños y vida activa. Ubicada en una urbanización exclusiva al norte de la capital, la propiedad fue adquirida en 2023. Se trata de una vivienda unifamiliar asentada sobre una parcela de aproximadamente 2.500 metros cuadrados , con cerca de 1.000 metros cuadrados construidos , repartidos en dos plantas principales. El tamaño es uno de sus grandes puntos fuertes, tanto en el interior como en el exterior, donde el jardín cobra un protagonismo clave. Distribución amplia y bien organizada La casa cuenta con cinco dormitorios y seis baños , además de un gran salón, cocina independiente, varias zonas de estar y espacios pensados para el uso diario de toda la familia. La distribución apuesta por estancias amplias y comunicadas, especialmente en la planta baja, donde salón y comedor se conectan visualmente con el jardín gracias a grandes ventanales. Estos cerramientos de cristal no sólo aportan luz natural durante todo el día, sino que permiten una relación directa entre interior y exterior, algo muy presente en la vivienda. Desde el salón se accede directamente a la zona ajardinada y a la piscina, lo que facilita el uso continuo de estos espacios, especialmente en los meses de buen tiempo. Interior: tonos claros y líneas contemporáneas En el interior, la decoración sigue una línea clara y actual. Predominan los tonos blancos, beige y arena , tanto en paredes como en mobiliario, lo que refuerza la sensación de amplitud. La...

The absolute insanity of the SNP’s plan to cap the price of food
content: The political drama (or farce) of Westminster politics will dominate the news agenda for the rest of the summer. The high-stakes Makerfield by-election next month will be followed by a Labour leadership election – or, possibly, a coronation – leading to a change of Prime Minister and an entirely new policy agenda. The consequences of this Labour Party blood-letting will be profound and quite possibly catastrophic , so let’s distract ourselves from it, for a short while, by turning our gaze north, beyond Manchester, to Scotland – where the Scottish National Party is entering its third decade in power. Before the recent elections I read the SNP’s manifesto, and was tickled by a number of proposals. They pledge to impose fresh taxes on private jets and mansions while giving every 18-year-old £200 to spend on culture. They want to provide a minimum income for artists and say they’ll hold more public inquiries, presumably just for the fun of them. What really stood out was the promise to cap the prices of basic food items including bread, milk and eggs. It was a bonkers proposal for a manifesto but now, having won, it’s becoming an insane part of their actual legislative agenda. In the words of former retail chief and West Midlands mayor Andy Street, it’s an idea that comes from the “economic madhouse” – but this is the SNP’s Scotland, and the lunatics are in charge. Shore Capital (home to some of the best retail analysts in the City) says the policy is the kind of thing you’d expect from “a severely struggling less developed nation.” SNP policy ‘hair-brained’ In a detailed note looking at the policy, they point out that “the UK has one of the most competitive grocery retail sectors in the world, backed up by a superb supply chain,” and that if the SNP want to help retailers – and consumers – they’d be better off looking at the mountain of external cost pressures on the sector, many of which stem directly from government . Shore Cap’s experts give the policy a fair hearing before concluding that it’s “hair-brained” and could only come from people who “have never worked in markets” and have spent a career “living off and spending other people’s money.” Meanwhile, returning our attention to Manchester, Andy Burnham kicked off his campaign for Prime Minister yesterday by pledging to make “rent, bills and fares” more affordable. He should wait and see how Scotland’s price caps work out before inflicting anything similar on the rest of us.

title: Capital won’t wait for Westminster to sort itself out
content: Britain can’t afford to spend the next six months navel gazing. We need to get serious about investing, says Katie Perrior Last month I woke up in Austin, Texas, pulled back the curtains in my hotel room and looked out across a skyline punctuated by cranes. Not just a handful of projects but dozens. Much to chagrin of the locals, the city seems to be permanently under construction. It was a useful reminder that growth is not a paper exercise, its tangible. Visible. You can literally feel it happening from under your feet and see it in the skies. Texas gets this. It thinks in decades – its recent opening of an FDI office in London, shows it to be aggressively going after business with lower taxes and attractive incentives, coming to our capital because they intend to bag more of it their end. It acts with the confidence of a place that expects to win. This week, I’m heading to Leeds for UKREiiF , where thousands from the property, infrastructure, regeneration and investment sectors will descend on the city and compete for a limited supply of hotel rooms while discussing the future shape of our towns and cities. It’s one of the most optimistic events in the conference calendar, from new stations to life science districts, data centres to energy infrastructure, these people are the drivers of growth. And yet there is an uncomfortable backdrop this year, and it’s a movie I’ve watched before. I know the storyline, if not the ending. Two years ago this week, I travelled to Leeds to speak at a dinner on politics. I stayed three hours before turning around and heading back to London. Rishi Sunak had called an election, and I was 200 miles away at wrong side of the country. I needed to be back in Westminster to advise clients on what came next. Labour’s overwhelming majority created a sense amongst international investors that Britain had finally found stability after the psychodrama of Brexit and Covid. Yet just 24 months later, Westminster has once again turned inward. Inconvenient distraction Britain really cannot afford to spend the next six months naval gazing while politicians sort themselves out. Investors do not stop spending because Westminster is inconveniently distracted – they just spend elsewhere instead. Capital doesn’t politely sit around waiting for us to mop up our own mess. Drift is so dangerous because its incremental – it’s not a sudden ‘shut up shop’ moment The biggest risk for Britain right now is drift. Drift is so dangerous because its...

“극우 멸콩 정용진이 격노? 스스로를 경질해야”...스벅 ‘탱크데이’ 후폭풍
content: 스타벅스가 5·18 민주화운동 46주년 기념일에 진행한 텀블러 판매 행사에 민주화운동을 폄훼하는 문구가 사용된 것을 두고 정용진 신세계그룹 회장이 손정현 스타벅스코리아(SCK컴퍼니) 대표를 경질한 가운데, 정치권에선 정 회장의 과거 ‘극우’ 행보를 거론하며 “꼬리 자르기 하지 말라”고 반발하고 있다. 광주광역시를 지역구로 둔 정진욱 더불어민주당 의원은 19일 페이스북에 “‘격노한’ 정용진? 똥 눈 놈이 성질나는 것도 유분수지, 당사자가 격노라니, 윤석열이냐”라며 “스타벅스의 5·18 폄훼가 신세계그룹이 아닌 다른 곳에서 일어난 남의 일인가”라고 올렸다. 정 의원은 “정용진은 격노니, 스타벅스 사장 경질이니로 물타기하지 말라. 먼저 반성하고 사과하는 것이 순서”라고 덧붙였다. 전날 신세계그룹은 “부적절한 마케팅 진행에 대한 책임을 물어 정용진 회장이 손정현 스타벅스코리아(SCK컴퍼니) 대표를 즉시 해임하기로 했다”고 밝혔다. 회사 쪽은 이번 사고가 5·18 민주화 운동의 숭고한 정신을 기리는 기념일에 일어난 것에 대해 정 회장이 격노했다고 밝힌 것으로 전해졌다. 최민희 민주당 의원도 이날 페이스북에서 “정용진이 5·18 탱크데이로 스타벅스 대표를 경질했단다. 뻔한 꼬리 자르기다”라고 비판했다. 권영국 정의당 서울시장 후보는 18일 페이스북에서 “정 회장 기사가 나왔기에 자진 사임한다는 기사인 줄 알았는데 스타벅스 대표를 경질했다는 기사였다”며 “실수로 여겨질 수도 있었던 사안에 대해 사람들이 의도성을 직감하고 스타벅스를 비난한 것은 정용진 회장의 극우 행보 때문”이라고 말했다. 권 후보는 “이번 일에 격노했다고? 스타벅스 노동자들은 신세계그룹이 스타벅스 최대주주가 된 날부터 5년째 ‘오너 리스크’에 격노하고 있다”며 “사죄와 사퇴 모두 정 회장의 몫이다”라고 말했다. 김성식 국민경제자문회의 부의장도 이날 페이스북에서 “‘탱크데이’ 행사는 정 회장의 기획 작품은 아니냐”라며 “정 회장 작품이 아니라면, 정 회장의 ‘멸콩’ 파문, 세월호 방명록 문구 조롱, 마가(MAGA) 네트워크 등을 보아온 회사 간부들의 정신세계가 아예 그렇게 바뀌어 있는 것인가”라고 주장했다. 김 부의장은 “(정 회장의) 유사한 언행이 한두 번도 아니고 때로 고의적으로 조롱을 합리화해 왔다”며 “대리 사장을 대리로 자르는 정 회장이 아니라 스스로 뭘 반성했기에 부랴부랴 밤에 인사 조치를 했는지 양심 고백을 해야 할 때”라고 덧붙였다. 앞서 스타벅스는 18일 오전 10시에 ‘탱크 시리즈’ 텀블러 판매를 시작하며 누리집에 ‘탱크데이’라는...
